name: JOE BIDEN ALERT (via DCCC)
subject: Joe’s STUNNING announcement:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DCCC | 430 South Capitol Street SE, Washington, DC 20003 | [(202) 863-1500](http://dccc
body:
When our President calls on us, we MUST deliver.
| | | **Joe Biden has asked you to step up.**

****[Did you see this?! President Joe Biden has called all of us to action to PROTECT our hard-fought House Majority and stop Trump and his House Republicans from rising to power again. When our President calls on us, we MUST deliver. We're calling for 13,500 gifts before our End of Month Deadline to answer Joe's call and fight for our House Majority. Will you chip in $3 to elect House Democrats? >>](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/Z6_Zc-vZ_)****

We're seriously disturbed.

**FIRST:** Republicans narrowed our House Majority to a razor-thin margin.

**THEN:** Trump and his Republicans helped incite a deadly insurrection at our nation's Capitol --_and as of 6pm, several of those rioters are running for Congress to destroy our House Majority!!_

**SO NOW:** We must answer President Biden's call to protect our House Majority and ensure these Republican cronies NEVER hold power!

[](https://links.e.dccc.)

**[We need to do everything in our power to stop these Republicans from defeating our House Majority. We're calling for 13,500 gifts in the door before our End of Month Deadline to ensure they never -- and we mean NEVER -- set foot in the halls of Congress to take back power. Can we count on your $3 right away to elect House Democrats? >>](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/Ka_)**

Frankly, we're appalled...

... Appalled that people like this would ever consider running for office.

... Appalled that Republicans WANT them in power.

... And appalled that, if they win, Trump could have an easier path back to the White House than ever before.

**[We'll fight tooth and nail to rescue our Majority -- but we're going to need your immediate help to pull it off. Can we count on your $3 before our End of Month Deadline in 72 hours? We're calling for 13,500 gifts to reach our goal and STOP these extremists from sabotaging our Democratic House Majority >>](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/k2R-)**
| | _If you 've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

We believe that emails are a crucial way for our campaign to stay in touch with supporters. However, if you'd just like to receive fewer emails, you can click [here](http://action.dccc.org/page/s/dccc-e-mail-options?m=46011912&r=MTI3NTcwMTg1MDQyNQS2&j=MjEyMzE1NzE1OQS2&l=13780807&e=dpwillis67@gmail.com).

We're working hard to make sure we protect our Democratic Majority -- and to put an end to Republicans' obstruction for good. President Biden can't do it all. We need all hands on deck if we're going to fight back against Republicans and expand our historic Majority. Our success relies on grassroots supporters like you. 99% of our contributions come from grassroots donations, with an average gift of $19. If you'd like to unsubscribe from DCCC emails, click [here](http://action.dccc.org/page/s/dccc-e-mail-options?m=46011912&r=MTI3NTcwMTg1MDQyNQS2&j=MjEyMzE1NzE1OQS2&l=13780807&e=dpwillis67@gmail.com). If you'd like to make an online donation, click [here](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/dcccactblue?amount=25). Thanks for your support of Democrats!

Contributions or gifts to the DCCC are not tax deductible.

clean_body: When our President calls on us, we MUST deliver. | | | Joe Biden has asked you to step up. ** We're seriously disturbed. FIRST: Republicans narrowed our House Majority to a razor-thin margin. THEN: Trump and his Republicans helped incite a deadly insurrection at our nation's Capitol --and as of 6pm, several of those rioters are running for Congress to destroy our House Majority!! SO NOW: We must answer President Biden's call to protect our House Majority and ensure these Republican cronies NEVER hold power! Frankly, we're appalled... ... Appalled that people like this would ever consider running for office. ... Appalled that Republicans WANT them in power. ... And appalled that, if they win, Trump could have an easier path back to the White House than ever before. ** | | If you 've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | | | Thank you, DCCC Paid for by the DCCC | 430 South Capitol Street SE, Washington, DC 20003 | | www.dccc.org | Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.

subject: The whole country is watching my race
body:
VIRGINIA DEADLINE: |

https://secure.winred.com/tina-ramirez-for-congress-inc/november-end-of-month-deadline?amount=5&utm_medium=email&utm_source=mc&utm_campaign=20211127_tinaramirez_november-end-of-month-deadline
Friend,

Virginia is in the midst of a Red Wave -- even the far-left Washington Post had to admit it!

“Republicans rise from the ashes as Democrats ponder what went wrong...”
(source: Washington Post)
And now, the whole country is looking to my Virginia Congressional Race -- to see if we can keep it going.

That’s why this November’s End-of-Month goal is the most critical deadline my campaign has faced yet.

On top of that, I just checked our campaign funds this morning, and we’re still $15,000 behind on our goal.
Friend, coming up short is not an option.

So please, make a contribution of any amount you can to ensure we reach our goal to flip this Virginia congressional district RED. (https://secure.winred.com/tina-ramirez-for-congress-inc/november-end-of-month-deadline?amount=5&utm_medium=email&utm_source=mc&utm_campaign=20211127_tinaramirez_november-end-of-month-deadline)

CONTRIBUTE $100 (https://secure.winred.com/tina-ramirez-for-congress-inc/november-end-of-month-deadline?amount=100&utm_medium=email&utm_source=mc&utm_campaign=20211127_tinaramirez_november-end-of-month-deadline)

CONTRIBUTE $50 (https://secure.winred.com/tina-ramirez-for-congress-inc/november-end-of-month-deadline?amount=50&utm_medium=email&utm_source=mc&utm_campaign=20211127_tinaramirez_november-end-of-month-deadline)

CONTRIBUTE $25 (https://secure.winred.com/tina-ramirez-for-congress-inc/november-end-of-month-deadline?amount=25&utm_medium=email&utm_source=mc&utm_campaign=20211127_tinaramirez_november-end-of-month-deadline)

CONTRIBUTE $10 (https://secure.winred.com/tina-ramirez-for-congress-inc/november-end-of-month-deadline?amount=10&utm_medium=email&utm_source=mc&utm_campaign=20211127_tinaramirez_november-end-of-month-deadline)

CONTRIBUTE ANY AMOUNT (https://secure.winred.com/tina-ramirez-for-congress-inc/november-end-of-month-deadline?utm_medium=email&utm_source=mc&utm_campaign=20211127_tinaramirez_november-end-of-month-deadline)

What happened in the Virginia Governor, Lt. Governor, and Attorney General races earlier this November just proves that Americans of all backgrounds are sick and tired of the radical left’s oppressive and radical policies.

But the bad news is that the Democrat’s epic losses have put Nancy Pelosi on high alert, and she’s putting all of her resources into Virginia races like mine.

I don’t expect to outraise her, but we do have to keep up with her -- and I can’t do that without the help of fed-up Americans like you,
Friend.

So please, make a contribution of any amount you can to ensure we hit our end-of-month goal to win this crucial Congressional seat back from the left. (https://secure.winred.com/tina-ramirez-for-congress-inc/november-end-of-month-deadline?amount=5&utm_medium=email&utm_source=mc&utm_campaign=20211127_tinaramirez_november-end-of-month-deadline)

Thank you,

Tina Ramirez

name: Catherine Cortez Masto
subject: our first public poll (not good)
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
| **Friend, a new poll shows me 2 POINTS behind my Trump-endorsed opponent.**

And now, I'm about to fall short of my make-or-break midnight fundraising goal. I have _nowhere_ else to turn, and VPP suggested I reach out to you, [ so I'm urgently asking you to split $5 before tonight’s deadline.](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/3902?t=6&akid=959%2E878179%2ENu1Baz) [](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/3902?t=7&akid=959%2E878179%2ENu1Baz) If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | [CONTRIBUTE $5 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/3903?t=8&akid=959%2E878179%2ENu1Baz)
---
This news couldn't have come at a worse time: CNN is already calling me one of the _most vulnerable_ senators in the country, The Cook Political Report _downgraded_ my chances of defending this seat, and now this new poll has me 2 points behind my extremist opponent.

**The GOP only needs ONE seat to flip the Senate – and it's clear they've got their sights set on Nevada.** GOP outside groups have poured more than $2 million into attack ads to defeat me – and this new poll shows their efforts could be working.

I cannot afford to lose any more ground, Friend, and Democrats cannot afford to lose in Nevada – not with Senate control hinging on my race. This poll is still within the margin of error, so I can turn this around, but it needs to happen now. That's why I'm counting on your immediate grassroots support to make it possible:

[**Please, will you split $5 or more to my campaign and VPP to help us defend the Democratic Senate majority?**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/3902?t=9&akid=959%2E878179%2ENu1Baz)
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:
[CONTRIBUTE $5 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/3903?t=10&akid=959%2E878179%2ENu1Baz)

[Or a custom donation »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/3902?t=14&akid=959%2E878179%2ENu1Baz)
I truly can't do this without you. Thank you so much for giving what you can at this critical moment.

_¡La lucha sigue!_ The fight continues!
Catherine

name: Caucus Room
subject: No End in Sight on Higher Fuel Prices
body:
The fuel prices continue to rise, and we're all facing larger bills to heat our homes this winter.
[View this message in your browser](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z3u10394bmo64rneblgsbafcln3um5usq7b8ls60_rp22sh2s8i66pj0s1ieeoj2c9h238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpq2d9ieuqfbdbie4rrcdljkorrbdt469r31d5jekrq9onicbrj8sjieso63dblm9pr4p3gm9qr9pb26hp34tti6doeepb7ctj73ddimmp34t30sv970sj2cpob4pjgsipm6o3im1j78p5l6krr5cj66jgb4pj0s2qm6o70mkoj3d9hmlp2bs)

[](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zmihrq70p0b2f9bv8ghb224mt3o7c0dflel1tcag_rp22sh2s8i66pj0s1ieeoj2c9h2bs)
No End in Sight on Higher Fuel Prices

The fuel prices continue to rise, and we're all facing larger bills to heat our homes this winter. Yet, we keep hearing that the Biden Administration is aware and willing to help. Still, Energy Secretary Jennifer Granholm can't name a single thing Biden has done to lower fuel prices. Instead, they continue to ban oil and gas leasing on federal lands and talk of shutting down another pipeline.

At [CaucusRoom.com](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zg53f8vgoaa5vnkf1p64c6te5hd3i6nk81epbb4g_rp22sh2s8i66pj0s1ieeoj2c9h2bs), members are free to discuss ideas, hold honest conversations and form their opinions without being overwhelmed or suppressed by the liberal bias inherent in Twitter, Facebook, and other platforms.

Parents, neighbors, friends, colleagues, and conservatives around the country use [CaucusRoom.com](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zqq0594ol1jiuqhdf9hbvrir651ocv8lb7541tr8_rp22sh2s8i66pj0s1ieeoj2c9h2bs) every day to cut through the noise and vitriol of the left and establish an authentic online community. subject: Something I Wrote the other Day

body:

Trying My Hand at Poetry

| [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c18459%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=%2ff8m0ZzKL5iKD8I6sE8ryA&sysid=1)
---

Friend,

I’ve been trying my hand at poetry. **_Could you let me know if it’s any good after reading?_**

_Roses are Red, the Southern Border is open

Joe Biden’s incompetence is as deep as the ocean

If I had a dollar, I’d try my hand at saving

Before Pelosi came for the Socialist’s taking_

subject: Help us fight socialism
body:
Socialism appears to be on the rise in our country, especially among the young, and we want to understand the extent of that sup
_Sponsored message_
| | |

| | This sponsored message from Trump Train News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2znlpgv867tnhvriughsedrge6jdmijee6ed5d64o_rp22sh2s8i66pj0s1ieeoj2c9h2bs)
| | | Dear Fellow American, Socialism appears to be on the rise in our country, especially among the young, and we want to understand the extent of that support. That’s why you have been selected by Hillsdale College to represent your state in a National Survey on Socialism. With your response, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans—views that we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. Every month, Hillsdale College is reaching millions of Americans with educational outreach. Your response to this National Survey on Socialism is essential in helping us form the most effective strategy in fighting for the future of our country. So please give your views on the political, media, and cultural forces that are promoting socialism in our country today, by completing this National Survey on Socialism: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/2021-national-survey-on-socialism/](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zrhpelu9iro8el8ik0ts48ou4u87nstf73ms5ff0_rp22sh2s8i66pj0s1ieeoj2c9h2bs)** There is no doubt in my mind that, especially among younger Americans, socialism is increasingly attractive—and that this threatens the future of American liberty. As Winston Churchill noted, “Socialism is the philosophy of failure, the creed of ignorance, and the gospel of envy.” And education is the surest way to defeat it. If you agree, please stand with Hillsdale College as we promote intelligent patriotism and defend liberty through education. Please represent your state and take the National Survey on Socialism today. | [**Take the Survey**](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zvga7kai4dufpv42skb0g7970kderh3akdorl820_rp22sh2s8i66pj0s1ieeoj2c9h2bs)

name: Jameson Ellis
subject: Peter, here's how we refund the police and Make America Safe Again
body:
| | | | |
---
| |
---
| | |
---
| | |
---
| | Peter,

Yesterday's email was disheartening, I know. Neither you nor I want to re-live 2020 or even think about the horrors faced by our men and women in blue.

However, we must remember... we must remember, learn, and take action.

Because if we don't learn from our past, we are doomed to repeat it.

This is why as your next Congressman, I will support and defend the Constitution of the United States against all enemies, foreign and domestic.

But what does that really mean, Peter?

Most people think about this in terms of foreign terrorism and wars we fight on foreign soil.

Well sure, it certainly is that...

But it's also the wars being fought right here at home.

And that is exactly the reason why I will fight to see ANTIFA & BLM, inc. officially labeled as domestic terrorist organizations.

The war on police ends now!

But we have to be strategic.

I recently met with Aaron Slater, a police veteran, academy instructor, and the owner & founder of Relentless Defender Apparel...

And we talked about how to accomplish two simple things:

1. Refunding the police
2. Disarming the critics

Because here's the deal...

Law enforcement represents the thin blue line between order and chaos.

They need our full backing and support from a local level all the way up to the federal level, and I will fight to make sure our police departments have more funding available for consistent training and continuing education.

With that being said, I am proud to announce that with the full endorsement of Aaron Slater, we've devised a plan on how this can be accomplished.

It will take proposing bills and grants that help provide more funding to departments and agencies at all levels... HOWEVER... that funding must come with reasoning and mandates to where the funds go.

"Well Jameson, wouldn't that raise the costs of the taxpayers?"

Great question, Peter.

The short answer is most likely not, because it shouldn't.

However, the long answer isn't that complicated because all that needs to happen is a redirection of funds. For example, when a police department is defunded, do taxes drop?

Nope.

They are merely redirecting the funds elsewhere.

Plus, if done correctly, we can implement strategies that lower overall costs.

We do that through consistent training across the board so that we can keep everyone vision and mission-focused. This in turn will increase the quality of service to the community, and ultimately keep expenses 30% of what it would normally cost.

How do I know this? Because Aaron Slater has both done it and seen it done.

It works.

But it will take working together on all levels, each staying within their jurisdictions, to make it happen.

By now, you should have connected with me on Facebook, but have you connected with me on Instagram, YouTube, or Twitter?

If not, I'd like to invite you to do that now by clicking below.

name: Pro Life Update
subject: For a limited time
body:
The events of the last year have no precedent in our nation’s history.
This sponsored message from Pro Life Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zv0e9luuqouq3sj6blurm2katjt60sc9rmc2n2no_rp22sh2s8i66pj0s1ieeoj6c1h2bs) Dear Fellow American, The events of the last year have no precedent in our nation’s history. They’ve shaken me, and I’m sure they’ve affected you as well. Throughout it all, you may have noticed a recurring theme from the progressives in the media, Big Tech, and politics. They insist that the government designed by our Founding Fathers, as expressed in the Constitution, is **flawed** and **outdated** —not adequate for the challenges of our time. How should defenders of the Constitution, like you and me, respond to such charges? Well, a few early champions of the Constitution—Alexander Hamilton, John Jay, and James Madison—have given you the guide: _The Federalist Papers_. Written between October 1787 and August 1788 under the pen name Publius, _The Federalist Papers_ were originally published as newspaper editorials intended to explain the merits of the Constitution. Thomas Jefferson described _The Federalist Papers_ as “the best commentary on the principles of government which ever was written.” That means that defenders of the Constitution have no better help in understanding the principles of liberty underlying our Constitution than the words of the Founders themselves. **So, I’d like to send you our entire 10-lesson course, “ _The Federalist Papers_ ,”on DVD today with a donation of $100 or more to Hillsdale College.** _**“The Federalist Papers”**_ course comes in a beautiful DVD box set for viewing in your home or a small group. You might also find it useful for a homeschool curriculum or personal study. It’s taught by Hillsdale’s knowledgeable faculty and will deepen your understanding of this incredibly relevant document even more. The DVD can also make an excellent gift for a friend or family member unfamiliar with our nation’s founding principles of liberty. [](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zmmi72uhojqkh34mjouv90gae10gjo42c773t190_rp22sh2s8i66pj0s1ieeoj6c1h2bs) Supplies are limited, though, so get this special edition of **_“The Federalist Papers”_** on DVD today. Given that more than 200,000 people have taken this course already, you can bet the DVD box set won’t last long. Click here to learn more about this DVD and order your copy of _**“The Federalist Papers”**_ today: [**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-federalist-papers**](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z00h2euq53i8rpjkile3fj3vosmncscsiq9ktjc8_rp22sh2s8i66pj0s1ieeoj6c1h2bs) Warm regards, Bill Gray Class of 2001 Associate Vice President of National Donor Outreach Hillsdale College
---
If dpwillis67@gmail.com should not be subscribed or if you need to change your subscription information for Pro Life Update, [please use this preferences page](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/prefs/9z2ztuosmmcrpogj9to2u2orhvc36h1db0ovgjid2rg).
625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

[](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zjalskinoc5boe06333b5rua6lsrpjv56ltelnig_rp2ash2s8j2ccdkmorb4dthe8gq48bi4bh28or6c3g69pr2cpg649fg)

Friend,

I’ve been trying my hand at poetry. **_Could you let me know if it’s any good after reading?_**

_Roses are Red, the Southern Border is open

Joe Biden’s incompetence is as deep as the ocean

If I had a dollar, I’d try my hand at saving

Before Pelosi came for the Socialist’s taking_

name: Charlie Kirk, TPUSA
subject: Biggest FREEDOM PARTY of 2021!
body:
This is really exciting news. Are you ready to hear it? Turning Point USA is beyond thrilled to announce a brand new event:
[View this message in your browser](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z4e6qi8c5suqcrcnveab0ovv0r390au2sj12kj1o_rp22sh2s8i66pj0shg62ob6cth238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpq8ddl69qbcd1jm4qj6d9jmpqj7d9neppqcdtlmui34thgmipnadt4sbp65s37m1gebdr4eao7ctlk6dqe4tdgehp36ppjmhge8c3665j31cj6cdp6ac36emo6fkjge9i3cc5icpp78cbmc3gb8p9gs2qj2p76cpj30tpl63jrcp366lhb6p9nm2qmash5u)
| | | [](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zft8ufq6g6lh7ot80a72ar3eb6kdiropk9j25od0_rp22sh2s8i66pj0shg62ob6cth2bs)
---
| [](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zkei1iodfc5k2ukd46qvl89vn1s495euhf0lkmvo_rp22sh2s8i66pj0shg62ob6cth2bs) Hi Fellow American, This is really exciting news. Are you ready to hear it? Turning Point USA is beyond thrilled to announce a _brand new event:_**AmericaFest 2021!** This four-day event will be _the largest conservative movement event in the country_ —and an event like you’ve _never_ seen, featuring dozens of the best and brightest conservative speakers, special musical guests, and non-stop energy and excitement alongside _thousands of like-minded, freedom-loving individuals._ [**TPUSA wants to get thousands of young people to AmericaFest 2021—but we need your help to do it.******](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2ztlr7u6d0qrmbp7eeilp0tjf3icuo9m1scp2n25g_rp22sh2s8i66pj0shg62ob6cth2bs) You see, thousands of young conservatives are ready to come to AmericaFest, but, being full-time students with limited resources, they simply don’t have the means to afford the ticket. I’m hoping that as a fellow patriot who loves America and cares about the next generation, you’ll help us meet some of those needs. **Will you help us educate and encourage our future leaders to steer this country in the right direction by**[**making a generous gift right now to TPUSA’s AmericaFest Scholarship Fund**](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zscmrhuf7lcofroiuo0j03f11gpnbf4aa5bbqipo_rp22sh2s8i66pj0shg62ob6cth2bs)**[?](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zl6bjus0iosjtlram7m4gc2qq1serqt4fat93n80_rp22sh2s8i66pj0shg62ob6cth2bs) ** [**A contribution of $35 will provide a One-Day Pass to this massive event for a conservative student. A generous gift of $100 will pay for an entire Four-Day Experience for a young conservative.**](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zjbu7cjrgstuu79rvac5eujihri6049omclu9v40_rp22sh2s8i66pj0shg62ob6cth2bs)
---
[**Give Gift!**](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zpl2mi71h0mbh3r5kiep5refc3ddv9lcp8bhu298_rp22sh2s8i66pj0shg62ob6cth2bs)
---
This four day celebration of America, of our constitutional rights, and of our freedom is happening this _**December 18-21 in Phoenix, Arizona**_** _._ **If you will be in the Southwest, I hope you’ll consider joining us! And if you’re not able to make it, [**please consider sponsoring a student today**.](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zjtgh2bnoqn6eqlj3lhirg52totqikt34ic9s0jg_rp22sh2s8i66pj0shg62ob6cth2bs) **AmericaFest 2021** will be an event unlike any this movement has ever seen—by creating an experience that breaks the traditional norms of a political conference as we continue to****_bridge the gap between politics and entertainment to win America’s culture war._ Guest speakers include: Donald Trump Jr. Senator Ted Cruz Tucker Carlson Candace Owens **And Many More!** Plus, full live concerts by: Dustin Lynch Brantley Gilbert RaeLynn Russell Dickerson **And More Musical Guests!** Plus entertainment, food, and presentations from dozens of conservative organizations. This event will go down in the history books as one of the greatest conservative events in the USA! But to make sure we can execute it to its fullest potential, we need __YOUR__ help to get as many young conservatives in the door as possible. [**Will you please help us do that with a generous Scholarship Contribution of $35, or even $100 today?**](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z3ejvr73hnh9cs3uov3458sivaek28v018tbtaog_rp22sh2s8i66pj0shg62ob6cth2bs)
---
[**Give One-Day Pass**](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zke1sf71gnmc4nn88s5ttvhrt70h02utdpuaftlg_rp22sh2s8i66pj0shg62ob6cth2bs)
---
[**Give Four-Day Experience**](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zq3fhi2mbg4qq9ardhltu6gmi7ikbhjn6vd9hvkg_rp22sh2s8i66pj0shg62ob6cth2bs)
---
[**Give Another Amount**](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2ze2is5ujvklm7ogssj1lc94cg8j01cdmbbd46s6g_rp22sh2s8i66pj0shg62ob6cth2bs)
---
I personally know many of our great guest speakers and musical guests very well. Each of them have personally told me they cannot wait to attend this incredible event! All have been working tirelessly to prepare for **AmericaFest 2021** and have promised not to disappoint! _It’s going to be awesome._ Building up this nation and empowering students through education is my life’s work. This event is a culmination of everything I have spent the last decade focusing on— _and so much more._ If you’re able, I hope you’ll join us **December 18-21 in Phoenix, Arizona** —[**and please consider sponsoring one or more students so they can attend this mind-opening, liberty-loving, informing and entertaining experience!**](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zf2fp73k3f5ub0d06v92oaheruo8fg2erig1i470_rp22sh2s8i66pj0shg62ob6cth2bs)
---
With unbridled excitement, Charlie Kirk Founder, President Turning Point USA
---
---
4940 East Beverly Road
Phoenix, Arizona 85044
---
If dpwillis67@gmail.com should not be subscribed or if you need to change your subscription information for American Defense News, [please use this preferences page](http://e.americandefensenews.com/prefs/9z2zrqoc36hir77p8adfm6emis7ricob5a3bi4hlpt8).
625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

[](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zuhqainarssgmdac47pvmn40e3ppe6kedb8j4dhg_rp22sh2s8i66pj0shg62ob6cth238h5e8he49h666qbcdli6uon49fg)

name: Val Demings
subject: Friend, about this campaign
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Val Demings for U
body:
why we need your support to defend the Senate.
| | |
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39069245/318290970/1581265324?refcode=jtk1795-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NDJmNzljNy00YjUwLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=rZbmj5XsRNVEBawTah4qleBa2CWLt2BWHAq7BNAhJUw=)
Friend, I'm Val Demings, and I'm running for the U.S. Senate to defeat Marco Rubio and win better, stronger leadership for the people of Florida. We're just a few months out of the gate, and election experts are already calling this a top battleground race for the Senate. Just 10,033 votes (0.2 percentage points) decided Florida's last Senate race – so I'll tell you the plain truth: I cannot win this without you.
**[That's why I'm asking you to become a donor to my campaign for Senate by contributing $5 or more now. Every dollar you can spare will help us build the strongest grassroots operation to defeat Rubio, flip Florida blue and defend our Senate majority.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39069246/318290971/1581265324?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1795-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NDJmNzljNy00YjUwLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=rZbmj5XsRNVEBawTah4qleBa2CWLt2BWHAq7BNAhJUw=)**
Every day, I carry with me that I am a descendent of enslaved people, people who knew that they would not make it, but dreamed and prayed that one day I would.
Their prayers carried me to this day – carried me through a life of public service as a social worker, as a law enforcement officer, the first Black woman to serve as Orlando's police chief and as the proud representative of Florida's 10th Congressional District.

**So hear me when I say this: Only in America can a little Black girl, the daughter of a maid and a janitor growing up in the South in the ’60s, have an amazing story of opportunity like mine. **

The prayers of my parents propel me forward, even now, giving me the strength and courage it takes to do what's right. To impeach and prosecute a corrupt president. To never stop fighting for gun safety reform. To push for truth, accountability, justice.
**I stand on the side of our democratic institutions, on the side of everyday working Floridians – but I need your help to win this race.[Will you make a contribution of $5 or more now to defeat Marco Rubio, win in Florida and defend our Democratic Senate majority?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39069247/318290972/1581265324?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1795-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NDJmNzljNy00YjUwLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=rZbmj5XsRNVEBawTah4qleBa2CWLt2BWHAq7BNAhJUw=)**
In my decades of public service, I've worked with some truly incredible individuals – champions of civil rights like my friend John Lewis, who said, "Each generation must do its part to create an even more fair, more just society."

We're at an inflection point for our democracy that will decide if we live up to John Lewis' dream, friend. The modern-day Republican Party is committed to the exact opposite of what Congressman Lewis stood for. Marco Rubio and Senate Republicans are putting party over the future of our democracy, over the wants and needs of Florida's working families.
You have my word, that when it comes to winning this race and delivering better leadership for Florida, I will fight like never before. Because when your friends and neighbors put their trust in you to be their voice, you work for them – and that's just not what we're seeing from Sen. Rubio. But it's only together that we'll have a shot at winning – so here's what I'm counting on: **2,116 donations before 11:59 p.m. tonight. Are you in, friend?**
**[Rush $5 or more now – whatever you can spare to fuel our battleground Senate race – so we can defeat Marco Rubio, flip Florida blue and defend our Democratic Senate majority!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39069248/318290973/1581265324?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1795-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NDJmNzljNy00YjUwLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=rZbmj5XsRNVEBawTah4qleBa2CWLt2BWHAq7BNAhJUw=)**
From the bottom of my heart, friend, thank you for being on my team.

Congresswoman Val Demings

| This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
[To unsubscribe from this email list, please click here.](https://email.ngpvan.com/unsubscribeUnique/e43ad69c-0b4c-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8/742f79c7-4b50-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NDJmNzljNy00YjUwLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=rZbmj5XsRNVEBawTah4qleBa2CWLt2BWHAq7BNAhJUw=&id=123159867) | | Paid for by Val Demings for U.S. Senate
---
Val Demings for U.S. Senate
P. O. Box 536926
Orlando, FL 32853
United States

disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Jane Hamilton Congressional Exploratory Committee
body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39073507/318310449/308357184?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ZTZjYWQyYy01OTUwLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=UmfVLZ6ty4XrIwsjvLZPdbWUwWDBOXFO26a5LS80T8Y=&emci=7a1c0008-acdb-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=6e6cad2c-5950-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=25686233) | A few days ago, we asked what you think should be the top priority for Congress right now. [**We want to hear from as many people as possible. Our government works for ALL of us when it listens to ALL of us -- can you take a minute to fill out our Priorities Survey? It’s super quick, I promise!**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39073508/318310450/1973621832?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ZTZjYWQyYy01OTUwLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=UmfVLZ6ty4XrIwsjvLZPdbWUwWDBOXFO26a5LS80T8Y=&emci=7a1c0008-acdb-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=6e6cad2c-5950-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=25686233) [TAKE THE SURVEY](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39073511/318310451/1973621832?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ZTZjYWQyYy01OTUwLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=UmfVLZ6ty4XrIwsjvLZPdbWUwWDBOXFO26a5LS80T8Y=&emci=7a1c0008-acdb-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=6e6cad2c-5950-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=25686233) I’ve worked on Capitol Hill as a Chief of Staff and here in Dallas as an activist, campaigner, and founder of a grassroots non-profit. Every day I’m using all that I've learned for the betterment of our community. I’ve seen how the voices of working people can get drowned out by big money or political nonsense. That’s why I’m building something different -- and why your submissions give me hope. **Here’s what some of you said should be the top priority for Congress right now:** _“Fighting misinformation, somehow. This is what discourages young people. I don't understand why adults want to lie to keep their places in power.”_ _“Getting back to taking care of the American people and our country ahead of personal or party concerns.”_ _“Gun violence prevention...2nd Amendment never meant for everyone to be 'packing' everywhere.”_ _“Help solo senior women like me who are below the poverty level. We’ve worked for decades while Social Security has been left unattended to meet inflation!”_ _“We need honest and clean government that gets the job done for the American People. Public service means serving the public, not helping yourself to the spoils.”_ _“Pass the For the People Act, the John Lewis Voting Rights Act, and the George Floyd Act in the Senate!”_ _“Public school education and pay raises for teachers.”_ **We also identified some of your most important priority issues:**
* 73% of you said protecting voting rights is a major priority.
* 65% of you said racial justice is a major priority.
* 60% of you said addressing climate change is a major priority.
* And 56% of you named police reform and gun violence prevention as major priorities.

**I hear you!** And if I run for Congress, I’ll make sure to continue to listen and get feedback every step of the way. [**We haven’t heard from you yet, Peter, but there’s still time! We’re looking to get to 300 responses by midnight, so please take a minute and let us know your top priorities →**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39073518/318310457/1973621832?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ZTZjYWQyYy01OTUwLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=UmfVLZ6ty4XrIwsjvLZPdbWUwWDBOXFO26a5LS80T8Y=&emci=7a1c0008-acdb-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=6e6cad2c-5950-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=25686233) [TAKE THE SURVEY](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39073523/318310464/1973621832?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ZTZjYWQyYy01OTUwLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=UmfVLZ6ty4XrIwsjvLZPdbWUwWDBOXFO26a5LS80T8Y=&emci=7a1c0008-acdb-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=6e6cad2c-5950-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=25686233) Thank you so much, \-- Jane
* * *
**PREVIOUS EMAIL:** Peter, From the streets of Dallas to the halls of Capitol Hill, I’ve been fighting for years to make life better for working people. That’s who I’m keeping in mind as I explore a run for Congress. From students to seniors to working moms like me, we deserve leaders who truly put our needs first. **Special interests don’t influence my agenda -- but folks like you do! That’s why I want to hear from you about your priorities and what you want Congress to get done.** [**Will you fill out this 2-minute priorities survey to let me know what’s on your mind? Your input is enormously helpful as we consider a campaign here in Texas’s 30th District:**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39073524/318310467/1973621832?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ZTZjYWQyYy01OTUwLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=UmfVLZ6ty4XrIwsjvLZPdbWUwWDBOXFO26a5LS80T8Y=&emci=7a1c0008-acdb-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=6e6cad2c-5950-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=25686233) [TAKE THE SURVEY](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39073525/318310468/1973621832?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ZTZjYWQyYy01OTUwLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=UmfVLZ6ty4XrIwsjvLZPdbWUwWDBOXFO26a5LS80T8Y=&emci=7a1c0008-acdb-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=6e6cad2c-5950-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=25686233) For me, health care looms large. I have two kids under seven, and monthly premiums keep going up and up -- not to mention the high cost of prescription drugs. And as someone who has personally experienced police brutality, I know we have to pass the George Floyd Justice in Policing Act to ban the worst police abuses like chokeholds and no-knock warrants and make sure all of our kids can walk our streets safely. Connected to all of this is voting rights. We’ve seen it here in Texas and across the country -- hundreds of bills restricting our freedom to vote. **We’ve got to pass the John Lewis Voting Rights Act and the For the People Act to set national standards and stop the disgraceful voter suppression laws.** [**Those are some of my priorities -- how about you? Please take a minute or two to fill out our priorities survey, and thank you for sharing your input!**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39073526/318310469/1973621832?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ZTZjYWQyYy01OTUwLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=UmfVLZ6ty4XrIwsjvLZPdbWUwWDBOXFO26a5LS80T8Y=&emci=7a1c0008-acdb-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=6e6cad2c-5950-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=25686233) Thank you and all the best, \-- Jane [CONTRIBUTE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39073527/318310470/337886703?refcode=onboarding-websitesignup-3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ZTZjYWQyYy01OTUwLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=UmfVLZ6ty4XrIwsjvLZPdbWUwWDBOXFO26a5LS80T8Y=) |
* * *
**Thank you so much for your support.** I'm Jane Hope Hamilton: a battle-tested activist and fighter for the people. I've served as a Chief of Staff on Capitol Hill and a state director for President Biden — now, I'm being encouraged to run for Congress in Texas's 30th District. If I run, I want to build a campaign powered by people, not big donors. **[Please, if you're able, can you join this historic effort as a Founding Donor?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39073528/318310471/337886703?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ZTZjYWQyYy01OTUwLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=UmfVLZ6ty4XrIwsjvLZPdbWUwWDBOXFO26a5LS80T8Y=)** [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39073529/318310472/-1684879413?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ZTZjYWQyYy01OTUwLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=UmfVLZ6ty4XrIwsjvLZPdbWUwWDBOXFO26a5LS80T8Y=) **Please also follow the campaign on[Facebook](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39073530/318310473/1836849408?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ZTZjYWQyYy01OTUwLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=UmfVLZ6ty4XrIwsjvLZPdbWUwWDBOXFO26a5LS80T8Y=&emci=7a1c0008-acdb-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=6e6cad2c-5950-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=25686233) and [Twitter](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39073531/318310474/-1722925373?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ZTZjYWQyYy01OTUwLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=UmfVLZ6ty4XrIwsjvLZPdbWUwWDBOXFO26a5LS80T8Y=&emci=7a1c0008-acdb-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=6e6cad2c-5950-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=25686233) »** Our email list is an important tool for us to reach Democrats and activists in Texas and around the country. clean_body: | A few days ago, we asked what you think should be the top priority for Congress right now. I’ve worked on Capitol Hill as a Chief of Staff and here in Dallas as an activist, campaigner, and founder of a grassroots non-profit. Every day I’m using all that I've learned for the betterment of our community. I’ve seen how the voices of working people can get drowned out by big money or political nonsense. That’s why I’m building something different -- and why your submissions give me hope. Here’s what some of you said should be the top priority for Congress right now: “Fighting misinformation, somehow. This is what discourages young people. I don't understand why adults want to lie to keep their places in power.” “Getting back to taking care of the American people and our country ahead of personal or party concerns.” “Gun violence prevention...2nd Amendment never meant for everyone to be 'packing' everywhere.” “Help solo senior women like me who are below the poverty level. We’ve worked for decades while Social Security has been left unattended to meet inflation!” “We need honest and clean government that gets the job done for the American People. Public service means serving the public, not helping yourself to the spoils.” “Pass the For the People Act, the John Lewis Voting Rights Act, and the George Floyd Act in the Senate!” “Public school education and pay raises for teachers.” We also identified some of your most important priority issues: 73% of you said protecting voting rights is a major priority. 65% of you said racial justice is a major priority. 60% of you said addressing climate change is a major priority. And 56% of you named police reform and gun violence prevention as major priorities. I hear you! And if I run for Congress, I’ll make sure to continue to listen and get feedback every step of the way. Thank you so much, \-- Jane PREVIOUS EMAIL: Peter, From the streets of Dallas to the halls of Capitol Hill, I’ve been fighting for years to make life better for working people. That’s who I’m keeping in mind as I explore a run for Congress. From students to seniors to working moms like me, we deserve leaders who truly put our needs first. Special interests don’t influence my agenda -- but folks like you do! That’s why I want to hear from you about your priorities and what you want Congress to get done. For me, health care looms large. I have two kids under seven, and monthly premiums keep going up and up -- not to mention the high cost of prescription drugs. And as someone who has personally experienced police brutality, I know we have to pass the George Floyd Justice in Policing Act to ban the worst police abuses like chokeholds and no-knock warrants and make sure all of our kids can walk our streets safely. Connected to all of this is voting rights. We’ve seen it here in Texas and across the country -- hundreds of bills restricting our freedom to vote. We’ve got to pass the John Lewis Voting Rights Act and the For the People Act to set national standards and stop the disgraceful voter suppression laws. Thank you and all the best, \-- Jane = | Thank you so much for your support. I'm Jane Hope Hamilton: a battle-tested activist and fighter for the people. I've served as a Chief of Staff on Capitol Hill and a state director for President Biden — now, I'm being encouraged to run for Congress in Texas's 30th District. name: Tom Nelson
subject: I’m proud of our campaign
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Nelson for Wisconsin**
body:
Tom Nelson serves as County Executive for Outagamie, one of the worst-hit COVID areas in the nation. Local officials have been leading our country through the pandemic because Donald Trump and Ron Johnson have failed. If you’d like to unsubscribe, [click here.](https://email.ngpvan.com/unsubscribeUnique/d0d1c3ee-cd4b-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8/bb064606-5b50-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Njk2MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiYjA2NDYwNi01YjUwLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=cBqoO9rFht7niPo05xf2E2Xa_Fh1n5_o2Qe8K7yFqQ8=&id=117942571) During this unprecedented and challenging time, please only donate to our campaign if you can afford to do so.
---
---

body:
Breaking News!
The GOP Super PAC launched ANOTHER six figure ad campaign against Tom!
We need all the help we can get in order to respond to these attacks and continue launching our campaign into overdrive. That’s why we need another 400 supporters to make a donation before the end of the month! [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tm-2111?amount=15]
If you’ve saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately:

Since we won by just 1.2% last year, the GOP has been targeting our race earlier than ever before. So as we head into our election year, it’s so important to prove that our grassroots team is stronger than ever and that we have what it takes to win again in 2022.
Please, make a donation to help us prove our strength and continue increasing our campaign momentum! [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tm-2111?amount=15]
Thank you for your support.

name: Ilana, Team Maggie
subject: URGENT: we messed up
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH
body:
| | |
---
We messed up, friend. With two days left until our November fundraising deadline, it looks like we aren't going to hit our goal. This is bad news. **Mitch McConnell only has to flip one seat to take back the Senate majority, and he's laser-focused on New Hampshire.** So far, GOP super PACs (including McConnell's) and special interest groups have spent upwards of $4.5 million attacking Maggie and rallying their extreme base. In a swing state like New Hampshire, falling short of a goal like this could tip the scales in McConnell's favor. If we're going to stand up to the GOP's war chest and protect this critical Senate seat, we need to correct our $15,000 shortfall. **[We can get back on track, but only with your help, So please, can you rush $5 before our deadline expires tomorrow night?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39074848/318316512/-1803038125?refcode=e20211128_iw-mistake&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzODFhZmRlYi01YjUwLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6Rt3vc-cpb62hox-Ptx5vDGhQ1gGp3DpOKKYR7F8SeA=)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [Contribute $5](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39074849/318316514/-1803038125?refcode=e20211128_iw-mistake&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&express_lane=true&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzODFhZmRlYi01YjUwLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6Rt3vc-cpb62hox-Ptx5vDGhQ1gGp3DpOKKYR7F8SeA=)

name: Jenna Henry, Keystone Progress
subject: It’s almost 2022. We need your help now more than ever.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Keystone Progress Education Fund, www
body:
Dear Friend,

These past two years have been filled with big moments of discord and of unity, in ways most of us have never before experienced in our lifetimes.

But it’s time for a new beginning. It’s almost 2022, and with this New Year comes new hope for real change and for building a progressive Pennsylvania.

That’s why we need your help now more than ever. Keystone Progress is working to preserve our democracy here in this key swing state and to support voting rights, women’s rights, LGBTQ+ rights, and the rights of workers and communities of color who have been disenfranchised and underserved for far too long.

Please donate TODAY, before the end of the month, so that we can meet our goal for November.

https://secure.actblue.com/donate/keystone-progress-now?refcode=112821&amount=20 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/keystone-progress-now?refcode=112821&amount=20] https://secure.actblue.com/donate/keystone-progress-now?refcode=112821&amount=30 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/keystone-progress-now?refcode=112821&amount=30] https://secure.actblue.com/donate/keystone-progress-now?refcode=112821&amount=50 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/keystone-progress-now?refcode=112821&amount=50]
Whatever you can afford... [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/keystone-progress-now?refcode=112821]

We thank you for supporting democracy and a progressive PA.

Jenna Henry
Keystone Progress

https://www.facebook.com/KPEdFund/ [https://www.facebook.com/KPEdFund/]

Paid for by Keystone Progress Education Fund, www.kpef.info. Not affiliated with any candidate or candidate's committees.

name: Charlie Crist HQ
subject: He’s spreading the Big Lie
disclaimer_text: Paid for and approved by Charlie Crist, Democrat for Governor
body:
|
---

| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39076398/318323936/414784906?refcode=20211128_f_1_fl&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MjRhY2I1NC01ZjUwLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=CwBVuUWk3ehYDTo2KOhLka6DMuoCZhnpb2GiV3dhH3Y=)
---
Friend,

**FIRST,** President Donald Trump created _**the Big Lie**_ that he won the 2020 election.

**THEN,** instead of refuting it, politicians like Gov. Ron DeSantis _**spread**_ the Big Lie far and wide.

Hey folks,
It’s time to Tax the Rich.
And we don’t mean your doctor or the lawyer down the street — we’re talking about the absurdly rich billionaires like Elon Musk, Jeff Bezos, and Warren Buffett, who, just for starters, _paid only 3.4% of a combined $401 billion (billion!)_ between 2014 and 2018.
The average American making $70,000, on the other hand, pays **14%** in taxes. **Pretty messed up if you ask us!**
[**Unfortunately, there’s no way whatsoever that we’re going to make the filthy rich pay their fair share while corporatists like Scott Franklin are in Congress. Make a donation of any amount now to help us change that and hold the rich accountable just like the rest of us.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39077019/318327930/-847830488?refcode=fl_email_fr_20211128taxtherich_EGweb_full_SLA_l1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjIyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhYTAxYTIxNi02NDUwLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=a-R10rJ5yoQVOO-PGmoToBRbuGMCMtpyVk3gpjnj-Ds=)
[DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39077020/318327931/-847830488?refcode=fl_email_fr_20211128taxtherich_EGweb_full_SLA_btn&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjIyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhYTAxYTIxNi02NDUwLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=a-R10rJ5yoQVOO-PGmoToBRbuGMCMtpyVk3gpjnj-Ds=)

The Build Back Better Act is in the hands of the Senate, which means we’re about to see just how far conservative Democrats like Joe Manchin and Kyrsten Sinema (who Wall Street refers to as “Saint Sinema”) are willing to go to hold corporations and the super wealthy accountable. It’s no secret that every aspect of the Build Back Better Act (and more!) would be possible if the rich would just pay their fair share.
But here’s the thing: **Whether or not it passes, this is likely Democrats’ last shot to get anything done before the midterms.**
That means the fight for progressive policies that will help families, millennials, and everyone-else-that’s-not-a-corporation-or-billionaire will all depend on electing people who will stand up for working people in 2022.
**So, we _must_ make sure that we elect a strong Tax the Rich caucus — yes, we made that up, but you get the idea — in the 2022 midterms, so that we can deliver real help to the working people who need it most.**
[**That starts by electing Eddie — will you make a donation of any amount now to help us do it?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39077021/318327932/-847830488?refcode=fl_email_fr_20211128taxtherich_EGweb_full_SLA_l2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjIyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhYTAxYTIxNi02NDUwLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=a-R10rJ5yoQVOO-PGmoToBRbuGMCMtpyVk3gpjnj-Ds=)

name: Blue Iowa 2022 (Update)
subject: We need your support to defeat Sen. Chuck Grassley (R-IA):
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Abby for Iowa Abby for Iowa
body:
Democrats' best opportunity in decades to flip Iowa blue
| | |
---
Peter: Democrat Abby Finkenauer – who is the youngest woman to ever flip a U.S. House seat from red to blue – recently launched her campaign for Iowa's Senate seat to defeat Chuck Grassley and protect our Democratic Senate majority.** But Abby's up against a tight end-of-month fundraising deadline and doesn’t yet have the resources it will take to flip Iowa blue. Here's where things stand:**
| | **Grassroots Supporter Record (Iowa Senate)**
---
EMAIL: **dpwillis67@gmail.com**
PROGRESS TO $50,000 GOAL: $12,868
SUGGESTED CONTRIBUTION TO DEFEAT SEN. GRASSLEY (R): **$5**
---
| | [CONTRIBUTE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39077689/318331425/805649176?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk327-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MzU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxYTNkZTlmMC02NDUwLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=2k3W3z9O-0zmcBWk-OUDKyIHZWhdriQeCOSIrtCnxZY=)
---
|
---
[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39077690/318331427/805649176?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk327-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MzU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxYTNkZTlmMC02NDUwLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=2k3W3z9O-0zmcBWk-OUDKyIHZWhdriQeCOSIrtCnxZY=)
---
Defeating Sen. He has dedicated his life to the service of others, as a father, pastor, community leader, elected official, and non-profit leader. He has served the Church in Kansas for over 25 years, most recently as the Senior Pastor of Trinity Community Church in Kansas City, Kansas for 19 years.

name: Wendy Rittenhouse
subject: NOT GUILTY.
body:
Kyle was just ACQUITTED and is now officially FREE! This was a victory for the truth, for justice, and for every American's God
[View this message in your browser](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zq1vemr1ks63htnb6fp6hiq0kdm5c5ud9cj1ltb0_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf99jksrr0s3iekr79c9l6eon9d1hmej3fddnkgp7cc5kmdqjf972u9hfatjleaor1d1hmmomapplcppnactlmhg77c31chge0t336hq76srmephn8dtke3jt4s3icgr31cj6e9q32tj0s2q6ac70mkom9pj6coo7ed9gs1r6aphks2pmcdtgmlin48d245p25oh4cdj61p34clh64pj24no)
| | | | [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z4gl5h8qimrd6smitecdq32t9gqgtmeajolhmp98_rp22sh2s8i66pj0shi6aoj2cph2bs)
---
|
---
Friend,

**Kyle was just ACQUITTED and is now officially FREE!**

This was a victory for the truth, for justice, and for every American's God-given and unalienable right of self-defense.

We are so overcome with emotion, and as hard as that was, we are thankful.

We are thankful for the millions of Americans who stood with Kyle from the start.

We are thankful for the many others who watched the trial with an open mind, realized that they had been lied to for a year and a half, and spoke out.

And we are thankful to the jury which put aside bias, considered the facts, and came to the right decision.

Now, we will try to return to something that resembles a normal life – **however that requires one more major push to settle our case-related debts and pay off what we hope will be our final legal bills.**

**[So please, take all that positive energy I know you're feeling and make an urgent donation to help us close this very ugly chapter in our lives.](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zd2i8rfid0h354ffsqrglstnsrmpi6frn89le2no_rp22sh2s8i66pj0shi6aoj2cph2bs)**
|
---
[DONATE NOW >>](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zfrm024ugnhpctl6gp8ne0a1j4p9558u8ffi17jo_rp22sh2s8i66pj0shi6aoj2cph2bs)
|
---
Any funds left over will be transferred into Kyle's scholarship fund so that he'll be able to graduate from college debt-free.

You'll be hearing from us again, but for now, and from the bottom of our hearts – thank you. Thank you. Thank you.

With love,

Wendy Rittenhouse
|

name: American Defense News
subject: Unlock the Federalist Papers
body:
The events of the last year have no precedent in our nation’s history. They’ve shaken me, and I’m sure they’ve affected
[View this message in your browser](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z0cg5kmq9mbfb28olp97c0mijvi65n6oes9gk3p0_rp22sh2s8i66pj0shi6aoj1cdh238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpq8ddl69qbcd1jm4qj6d9jmpqj7d9neppqcdtlmui34thgmipnadt4sbp65tjk6cqjcsjimhqe2s32cpo61p336lqbddjje3hb9p5ge4pn8p5m6cp36t3nc1oefkjge9i3cc5icpp78cbmc3gb8p9gs2qj2p76cpj30tpl63g7cpb66jjjbcr7m2qmash5u)
This sponsored message from American Defense News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z100aihcaeibocr5p3mpghkblo9g4s718aeh5358_rp22sh2s8i66pj0shi6aoj1cdh2bs) Dear Fellow American, The events of the last year have no precedent in our nation’s history. They’ve shaken me, and I’m sure they’ve affected you as well. Throughout it all, you may have noticed a recurring theme from the progressives in the media, Big Tech, and politics. They insist that the government designed by our Founding Fathers, as expressed in the Constitution, is **flawed** and **outdated** —not adequate for the challenges of our time. How should defenders of the Constitution, like you and me, respond to such charges? Well, a few early champions of the Constitution—Alexander Hamilton, John Jay, and James Madison—have given you the guide: _The Federalist Papers_. Written between October 1787 and August 1788 under the pen name Publius, _The Federalist Papers_ were originally published as newspaper editorials intended to explain the merits of the Constitution. Thomas Jefferson described _The Federalist Papers_ as “the best commentary on the principles of government which ever was written.” That means that defenders of the Constitution have no better help in understanding the principles of liberty underlying our Constitution than the words of the Founders themselves. **So, I’d like to send you our entire 10-lesson course, “ _The Federalist Papers_ ,”on DVD today with a donation of $100 or more to Hillsdale College.** _**“The Federalist Papers”**_ course comes in a beautiful DVD box set for viewing in your home or a small group. You might also find it useful for a homeschool curriculum or personal study. It’s taught by Hillsdale’s knowledgeable faculty and will deepen your understanding of this incredibly relevant document even more. The DVD can also make an excellent gift for a friend or family member unfamiliar with our nation’s founding principles of liberty. [](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z91r5ekbe1ef1au2mt0laultjteo7iut7gppm4fg_rp22sh2s8i66pj0shi6aoj1cdh2bs) Supplies are limited, though, so get this special edition of **_“The Federalist Papers”_** on DVD today. Given that more than 200,000 people have taken this course already, you can bet the DVD box set won’t last long. Click here to learn more about this DVD and order your copy of _**“The Federalist Papers”**_ today: [**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-federalist-papers**](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zmvv2eoilra3lchjjeac6m5eo1cbh0ff7ergpdf8_rp22sh2s8i66pj0shi6aoj1cdh2bs) Warm regards, Bill Gray Class of 2001 Associate Vice President of National Donor Outreach Hillsdale College
---

name: ICYMI News
subject: Math and logic
body:
Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills, Abraham Lincoln credited his study of Eucli
| _Sponsored message_ |
---|---|---
This sponsored message from ICYMI News is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z9flqduln8ld6cfnoq4pmtj8jfqk09anpq93h868_rp22sh2s8i66pj0shi6aoj4c3h2bs)
---
| | Dear Fellow American,
Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills, Abraham Lincoln credited his study of Euclid.
While studying law in Springfield, Lincoln explained, he became convinced that the ability to demonstrate the truth of things was essential to the good practice of law.
Consequently, Lincoln left his job, retired to his father’s cabin, and did not return until he could “give any proposition in the six books of Euclid at sight.”
By studying Euclid, we improve our ability to reason soundly—plus, in my experience, the study of Euclid can be great fun.
That’s why Hillsdale College has produced a free online course on the topic **“Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry.”**
Through**“Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry,”** you will learn the importance of deductive reasoning as a foundation for pursuing knowledge in all fields of learning, as well as in everyday life.
---
| | **Now, the course is available in a beautiful DVD box set for viewing in your home or for use in a small group.** **** **You can receive the DVD box set as a thank-you for your tax-deductible gift of $100 or more in support of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty.**
Your tax-deductible gift will help promote our free online courses and other educational outreach efforts in this critical time for our nation. And your gift matters even more because...
Hillsdale accomplishes all its work while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.
---
| [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zdjtk0mqtdehfe6htqc3gvh2aqkc5h0qhktkg04g_rp22sh2s8i66pj0shi6aoj4c3h2bs)
---
| | That’s why we need the support of friends like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty.
Quantities of this special DVD box set are limited, so reserve your copy today. I’ve included a secure link for you to make your tax-deductible gift below:
[_**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/dvd-mathematics-and-logic-course**_](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zs3dbl696e0rm7gbfbs4bilbgrsrbi3h6autobl0_rp22sh2s8i66pj0shi6aoj4c3h2bs)
Thank you for partnering with Hillsdale in its mission on behalf of liberty.
Warm regards,
Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844

name: MalcolmKenyatta.com
subject: tough decisions
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Malcolm PAC
body:
We are just 48 hours out from our November fundraising deadline
#

Here's the deal, folks —
We are just 48 hours out from our November fundraising deadline, but honestly, we’re pretty far from where we need to be.
That’s bad news, especially since our fundraising goals aren’t arbitrary. Our budget for December depends on us hitting this goal. If we fall short, we’ll have to make some tough decisions.
**So, we’ve got two options:**
* Either more people need to pitch in before our deadline on Tuesday
* Or, we need folks to contribute just a little bit more than usual

[Most first-time contributors donate about $5. Will you please make a contribution of $10 to help us get back on track before our deadline? We cannot win this race if we miss this goal.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39079330/318339014/-360183459?refcode2=12829f03-6c50-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&refcode=em211128-1-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMjgyOWYwMy02YzUwLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9z8hIF_rHaMhtXVxdanKGFdizlNqLZoiEOJnWEI4nzc=)
**[CONTRIBUTE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39079331/318339015/-360183459?refcode2=12829f03-6c50-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&refcode=em211128-1-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMjgyOWYwMy02YzUwLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9z8hIF_rHaMhtXVxdanKGFdizlNqLZoiEOJnWEI4nzc=)**
Malcolm represents working Pennsylvanians. He grew up in the projects in North Philly and knows what it’s like to face an eviction notice because minimum wage work doesn’t pay the bills.
He’ll fight for working families in the Senate because he’s experienced the pain that Washington’s failures have inflicted on Pennsylvania firsthand.
But first, we have to win this race — and it’s going to take building the biggest coalition of working folks that Pennsylvania has ever seen to do it.
**So, are you in? This campaign is powered by lots and lots of folks chipping in a few dollars at a time, so we’re counting on grassroots donations from emails like this one to keep up our momentum.**
[If you're able, please make a $10 donation to put us back on track before our deadline on Tuesday.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39079332/318339016/-353695395?refcode2=12829f03-6c50-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&refcode=em211128-1-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMjgyOWYwMy02YzUwLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9z8hIF_rHaMhtXVxdanKGFdizlNqLZoiEOJnWEI4nzc=)
Thank you for supporting our campaign.
Team Malcolm

* * *

Hey Derek — it's me again. Our November deadline is just 48 hours away. **[I know you're probably busy and still stuffed from Thursday, but while I have your attention — can you pitch in $10?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39079259/318338715/-751938712?refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_EOM_AC_20211128_AM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODYxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4YmEyMWNhMC02YTUwLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=UrKdlpKzRW6wqt1eVedhwLm9k3G6-wUD1yxdh0tCgtU=)** When the GOP is ranking in millions of dollars from corporate lobbyists and billionaire donors, $10 might not seem like much. | | Hi there Peter, Most people would say that it’s officially holiday season, but in our house, that means football season. For the record, our house roots for the Panthers through thick and thin and celebrates Rams losses. Also for the record, my fantasy football team is projected to beat Jasmine’s this week. She cares, I do not. The end of November also means that Jasmine is rapidly approaching her end-of-month deadline. As in sports, this period will set the tone for the fourth quarter. clean_body: | = | | Hi there Peter, Most people would say that it’s officially holiday season, but in our house, that means football season. For the record, our house roots for the Panthers through thick and thin and celebrates Rams losses. Also for the record, my fantasy football team is projected to beat Jasmine’s this week. She cares, I do not. The end of November also means that Jasmine is rapidly approaching her end-of-month deadline. As in sports, this period will set the tone for the fourth quarter. = | | | = While I may not care enough about my fantasy football team to field an uninjured squad from week to week, what I do care a lot about is the message we send to our kids about our values and what kind of world we want to live in. Jasmine is running in NC-14 to replace Madison Cawthorn’s divisive and fear-mongering tactics with love, hope, and empathy. But it’s going to take our whole team to win. = | | = | | = | | = | | = | | = | | = LFG! \-- Meghann | | We believe that emails are the best way for our campaign to stay in touch with supporters like you. The Radical Left tried to cancel me because I don’t fit into their narrative – they hate that I’m a strong, outspoken, black Republican woman who stands with our law enforcement, believes in parents’ rights, and LOVES FREEDOM.

That’s why they’re doing EVERYTHING in their power to stop more conservatives just like me from beating their far-Left socialist candidates. **[Conservatives are counting on you to help us fight back. subject: We win if we work together, friend
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ortega For Congress
body:
| | [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39079900/318342140/-550609136?refcode=fl_email_fr_20211128M4A_TO_full_SLB_img1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjU2NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNmQ5ZTkyYS02ZDUwLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=AIfquEDp7enX7v5dCnjWAgOONHCgf8hG2UY9sTqIulc=)
---
Amiguis,
Lou Correa has been in elected office for nearly 25 years.
Over those last 25 years, our district has seen the costs of healthcare skyrocket. In the meantime, the wages for working families have stayed the same — and the wealthy have gotten richer.
Our district deserves a Democrat who will fight with political courage for what our people need, not for the profits of insurance companies. Mike isn't taking a dime of corporate PAC or lobbyist money. **We’re a grassroots, people powered campaign.** [Could you rush in a $4.96 donation?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39079902/318342141/-550609136?refcode=fl_email_fr_20211128M4A_TO_full_SLB_abx4.96&express_lane=true&amount=4.96&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjU2NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNmQ5ZTkyYS02ZDUwLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=AIfquEDp7enX7v5dCnjWAgOONHCgf8hG2UY9sTqIulc=)
---
**Lou, a conservative, repeats his corporate donors’ lies and supports weaker legislation that will keep Americans under the boot of Big Pharma.** In return, Big Pharma funds his campaign and spends hundreds of thousands on ads in his favor.
That's why we need your help, amiguis. Regardless of what anyone says, access to quality, affordable healthcare is a human right — which is why Mike will fight tirelessly for Medicare For All in Congress as soon as he’s elected.
Since we’re a grassroots operation, we rely on emails like this one to build our people-powered campaign — could you chip in as little as $4.96 today?
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:

clean_body: | | = Amiguis, Lou Correa has been in elected office for nearly 25 years. Over those last 25 years, our district has seen the costs of healthcare skyrocket. In the meantime, the wages for working families have stayed the same — and the wealthy have gotten richer. Our district deserves a Democrat who will fight with political courage for what our people need, not for the profits of insurance companies. Mike isn't taking a dime of corporate PAC or lobbyist money. We’re a grassroots, people powered campaign. = Lou, a conservative, repeats his corporate donors’ lies and supports weaker legislation that will keep Americans under the boot of Big Pharma. In return, Big Pharma funds his campaign and spends hundreds of thousands on ads in his favor. That's why we need your help, amiguis. Regardless of what anyone says, access to quality, affordable healthcare is a human right — which is why Mike will fight tirelessly for Medicare For All in Congress as soon as he’s elected. Since we’re a grassroots operation, we rely on emails like this one to build our people-powered campaign — could you chip in as little as $4.96 today? If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = | = | = ---|---|--- = | = | = ¡Ándele! — Team Ortega = | Mike Ortega is a Democrat running for Congress in CA-46 to fight for all working people who call America home. name: Michelle Lujan Grisham
subject: I'm getting worried we could lose momentum
disclaimer_text: Paid for by New Mexicans for Michelle, John Wertheim, Treasurer
body:
I'm getting worried we could lose momentum
| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39080070/318342670/-1540418300?refcode=jtk1078-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzc2OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZjUzMTI0ZS02ZDUwLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ld8xKcTliJSIqMBi55-h0Eb44hCSNmZ-ty0SBhdQyx0=)
---
Hi, Peter.

Our grassroots movement is stronger than ever before, and I'm so proud of the thousands of New Mexicans who are committed to our bold, progressive agenda. Together, we're drowning out the GOP naysayers with our calls for a brighter, more equitable future.
There has been overwhelming support over the past few weeks as we approach our fundraising blackout, but these next few days are the most critical to our success, **and I'm getting worried we could lose momentum.** That's why I'm reaching out with this exclusive offer for some of my best supporters:
**[Peter, if you donate $5 today, you can become an official MLG Team Member – which will send a clear message that you are committed to keeping New Mexico blue. Will you rush $5 to join our team and help us reach our goal of 450 MLG Team Members by midnight?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39080077/318342678/-1540418300?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1078-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzc2OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZjUzMTI0ZS02ZDUwLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ld8xKcTliJSIqMBi55-h0Eb44hCSNmZ-ty0SBhdQyx0=)**
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39080084/318342685/-1540418300?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1078-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzc2OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZjUzMTI0ZS02ZDUwLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ld8xKcTliJSIqMBi55-h0Eb44hCSNmZ-ty0SBhdQyx0=)
**These past three years, I've watched the GOP become more and more extreme:** New Mexico Republicans yelled profanities at journalists covering my reelection speech, stayed silent on the critical issue of vaccinating our state residents and continued to support federal politicians who inspired an insurrection.
If Republicans flip New Mexico red, all of the progress we've made – from cutting taxes for middle-class families to legalizing marijuana – could be erased in an instant. It's going to take thousands of grassroots supporters to continue to drown out their noise and elect Democrats up and down the ballot, **so I'm counting on you to join our team:**
**[I need to know that you have my back – through thick and thin – from today right up to the moment the polls close. Will you donate $5 to help us reach our goal of 450 MLG Team Members by midnight tonight? Every donation will help us keep New Mexico blue.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39080088/318342690/-1540418300?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1078-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzc2OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZjUzMTI0ZS02ZDUwLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ld8xKcTliJSIqMBi55-h0Eb44hCSNmZ-ty0SBhdQyx0=)**
Thank you for your support. I can't wait for you to join the team.

Michelle Lujan Grisham
| This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
[To unsubscribe from this email list, please click here.](https://email.ngpvan.com/unsubscribeUnique/217e92cb-7148-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8/3f53124e-6d50-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzc2OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZjUzMTI0ZS02ZDUwLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ld8xKcTliJSIqMBi55-h0Eb44hCSNmZ-ty0SBhdQyx0=&id=127162320) | | Paid for by New Mexicans for Michelle, John Wertheim, Treasurer
