---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39080307/318343589/847440212?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NTE3NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlOWYxZWZjNy02ZDUwLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Vyu8xyL5LkeNk0cXFGfWEoStHRBAvCXmJyZUvAxHOlc=&emci=e5f1efc7-6d50-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=e9f1efc7-6d50-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=10203249) Supporters, it’s clear that Scott Perry has no interest in or supporting any Central Pennsylvanian facing domestic violence. In his classic fashion, our “representative” stood with his party, stood against our values, and happily voted against the Violence Against Women Act, a bill that since 1994 has passed without conflict -- until extremist Republicans stopped getting their way. [**Scott Perry’s actions would leave millions of people facing abuse without any federal support. That’s why we need you to send a message to Scott Perry by signing our petition and letting him hear the truth from you: it’s time to start supporting victims of domestic abuse NOW!**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39080308/318343595/-701983696?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NTE3NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlOWYxZWZjNy02ZDUwLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Vyu8xyL5LkeNk0cXFGfWEoStHRBAvCXmJyZUvAxHOlc=&emci=e5f1efc7-6d50-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=e9f1efc7-6d50-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=10203249) **[SIGN ON HERE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39080309/318343596/-701983696?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NTE3NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlOWYxZWZjNy02ZDUwLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Vyu8xyL5LkeNk0cXFGfWEoStHRBAvCXmJyZUvAxHOlc=&emci=e5f1efc7-6d50-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=e9f1efc7-6d50-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=10203249)** The VAWA is a groundbreaking piece of legislation that has not only made domestic violence and sexual assault a crime, but has provided millions in federal funds to support PA shelters. But that’s not it. Rep. Perry also voted against the Family Violence Prevention and Services Act -- the only federal funding source dedicated solely to domestic violence services and programs. For forty years, it has been reauthorized and funded with bipartisan support— but Scott Perry STILL voted no. Eugene, on the other hand, used his time in office to decrease the backlog of untested rape kits and the thousands of unanswered calls to the Child Abuse Hotline. He made lawmakers and party leaders mad, but that didn’t stop him, and he got the job done. But Scott Perry doesn’t care about helping anyone but himself. As long as he has support from the far-right fringe of his own party, he’s more than happy to turn his back on us, ignore his responsibilities, and cut funding to help support victims of abuse. [**We need all of our grassroots supporters to sign on to our petition and demand that Scott Perry stand up for victims of domestic violence. Add your name and make sure your voice is heard today. **](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39080310/318343597/-701983696?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NTE3NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlOWYxZWZjNy02ZDUwLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Vyu8xyL5LkeNk0cXFGfWEoStHRBAvCXmJyZUvAxHOlc=&emci=e5f1efc7-6d50-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=e9f1efc7-6d50-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=10203249) Thank you,

It’s about being able to win through all of 2022 and take back the Secretary of State’s Office for the people. = We can do this, Team Chelsea | | Democrat Chelsea Clark is a small business owner, a city councilwoman, a sixth-generation farmer, and a single mom. name: Jason Crow
subject: Protecting Colorado’s senate seat
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bennet for Colorado
body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39081106/318346586/721416609?refcode=header&amount=25&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiYWVkOGU5Yi03MTUwLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0ylImryn7pv4U2vtlxeubxtb6wJ8JfvitVdSZ7i8r0g=)
Team, My friend, Senator Michael Bennet, and I have a lot in common. Our vision for Colorado has led us to fight together for the future we all deserve, and I have no doubt that he is the leader we need now more than ever. Together we passed the bipartisan infrastructure bill that will repair our roads, help us recover from wildfires, and expand high-speed internet access to tens of thousands of Coloradans who currently lack it. We’re also making huge strides in our work to pass the _Build Back Better Act_. We have to continue to build on that progress — to do that, we need elected leaders who are ready to fight for Colorado and get things done. That’s Michael. However, Michael’s up for re-election this cycle and with the razor-thin majority in the Senate, it only takes one seat for the Senate to flip red. With so much on the line, we can’t afford to lose his leadership. [_**Michael is the only Senator up for re-election that refuses to accept corporate PAC and federal lobbyist money, so we need a strong grassroots team like this one to lift him up. clean_body: | = Team, My friend, Senator Michael Bennet, and I have a lot in common. Our vision for Colorado has led us to fight together for the future we all deserve, and I have no doubt that he is the leader we need now more than ever. Together we passed the bipartisan infrastructure bill that will repair our roads, help us recover from wildfires, and expand high-speed internet access to tens of thousands of Coloradans who currently lack it. We’re also making huge strides in our work to pass the Build Back Better Act. We have to continue to build on that progress — to do that, we need elected leaders who are ready to fight for Colorado and get things done. That’s Michael. However, Michael’s up for re-election this cycle and with the razor-thin majority in the Senate, it only takes one seat for the Senate to flip red. name: Mike Collier
subject: Can I share an important number with ya, friend?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Collier Committee
body:
|
#
---
Mornin’, folks — In a minute, I’m about to ask you to add a donation to our grassroots campaign for Lieutenant Governor in Texas. But first, I hope you’ll give me a chance to share an important number and a short explanation with you: **_97%._** We’ve raised $1.3 million so far to fuel our movement to unseat Dan Patrick. Yep, you read that right — over one million dollars. **But the number I’m most proud of is 97%. ** You see, **_97%_** of nearly 14,000 contributions are from individual Texans just like you. This is so meaningful to me because I’m not taking a penny from corporate PACs — not now and not ever. Powerful corporations can buy as many lawmakers as they want, but the good people of Texas get only one Lieutenant Governor. I’ll admit that does mean that I’m going to have to ask you for money here and there — but I’ll never claim that the sky is falling or the world will end if you don’t chip in. It’s not in my nature to be hyperbolic. And that’s not how I do things because I know how hard you work for every dollar. Every time I ask you to chip in, I want you to know that it’s rooted in the needs of our campaign. Your money helps us hire staff, barnstorm across the state, and spread our message far and wide. I’ll also never ask for more than you can give. But the other side is flush with millions of dollars from dark money special interest groups. And every dollar we raise from grassroots supporters like you puts us closer to leveling the playing field for our movement by the people of Texas, for the people of Texas. clean_body: | Mornin’, folks — In a minute, I’m about to ask you to add a donation to our grassroots campaign for Lieutenant Governor in Texas. But first, I hope you’ll give me a chance to share an important number and a short explanation with you: 97%. We’ve raised $1.3 million so far to fuel our movement to unseat Dan Patrick. Yep, you read that right — over one million dollars. But the number I’m most proud of is 97%. You see, 97% of nearly 14,000 contributions are from individual Texans just like you. This is so meaningful to me because I’m not taking a penny from corporate PACs — not now and not ever. Powerful corporations can buy as many lawmakers as they want, but the good people of Texas get only one Lieutenant Governor. I’ll admit that does mean that I’m going to have to ask you for money here and there — but I’ll never claim that the sky is falling or the world will end if you don’t chip in. It’s not in my nature to be hyperbolic. And that’s not how I do things because I know how hard you work for every dollar. Every time I ask you to chip in, I want you to know that it’s rooted in the needs of our campaign. Your money helps us hire staff, barnstorm across the state, and spread our message far and wide. I’ll also never ask for more than you can give. But the other side is flush with millions of dollars from dark money special interest groups. And every dollar we raise from grassroots supporters like you puts us closer to leveling the playing field for our movement by the people of Texas, for the people of Texas. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = = | = = | = = Thanks for hearing me out today. And to every Texan that has contributed — thank you, thank you for all of your support. None of this is possible without you. — Mike The Collier Committee P.O. Box 14648 Humble, TX 77347 United States | | Paid for by the Collier Committee

body:
I’m about to miss tonight’s goal. Can you help me, Fellow Conservative?
& nbsp; &nb; sp;

|

---
| | | Fellow Conservative,

**First:** Democrats raised well over $130 MILLION to flip South Carolina blue.

**Then:** Democrats announced a plan to target Senate Republicans and lock in a liberal Senate majority.

**Now:** Republicans like me are falling behind. We can’t fight back without YOUR help!

**[I need you and 7 more patriots reading this message to chip in at least $10 each by tonight’s deadline to help Republicans fight back and beat the Democrats.](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-2yc6g-1mqw1-4qqlpo1/ "I need you and 7 more patriots reading this message to chip in at least $10 each by tonight’s deadline to help Republicans fight back and beat the Democrats.")**

---
**Fellow Conservative, I can’t hold on for long without your help. I’m one of the Democrats’ TOP TARGETS to defeat in the next election.**

Democrats are only ONE seat away from locking in a liberal Senate majority and passing their full agenda -- like making D.C. a state, raising taxes, ending the Second Amendment, and packing the Supreme Court.

Don’t let Democrats beat us and get their way in Washington. Our country would never again be the same.

The good news is that you can stop this. I just need your help to fight off the Democrats’ well-funded attacks and support Republicans running in the toughest elections around the country.

**[I just need 8 more patriots to reach today’s goal, stop the Democrats, and win back the Senate for Republicans. Will you help?](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-2yc6g-1mqw3-4qqlpo3/ "I just need 8 more patriots to reach today’s goal, stop the Democrats, and win back the Senate for Republicans. Will you help?")**

---
**I’ll be looking to see who steps up and answers my call for help, Fellow Conservative.**

Thank you,

Tim Scott

Republicans are ready for a RED WAVE to win back the House and Senate.

But Democrats are raising MILLIONS from wealthy donors. They will do ANYTHING to stop Republicans from winning.

I’m asking for your help to overcome the Democrats’ fundraising advantage and finally stop Joe Biden’s agenda in Congress.

clean_body: We need you in our corner = Peter, we’re getting worried. Right now -- with help from Washington Republicans and special interest groups -- our opponent has over $1 million stockpiled in her campaign bank account. We have been working around the clock to catch up, and we have a big end-of-month fundraising deadline in just a few days. = | = We need to hit every single one of our monthly goals if we’re going to be competitive in this race. That means we need grassroots supporters like you on our side chipping in what they can when they can. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately. = | = ---|--- = | = = | = = Every donation gets us one step closer to closing that fundraising gap and putting an end to special interest influence in our community. Thank you. \-- Team Mathis HQ Liz Mathis is a lifelong Iowan, State Senator, and former local news reporter running to represent Iowa's 2nd Congressional District in Congress. = | = | Liz Mathis is running to represent Iowa's 2nd Congressional District. subject: Not too ruff
disclaimer_text: Paid for by John King for Governor, Eliza Leighton, Treasurer
body:
John is the ideal person to sit near when hanging out underneath the Thanksgiving dinner table.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39082975/318353644/-923212789?refcode=BLU-KING-20211128-b-EM&&&&amount=25&refcode2=b33ae894-7950-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMzNhZTg5NC03OTUwLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=GbnZTm9fLDfqxUDzeIckho6m-Xd8R5Aaxexa1xBZSJI=)
---
| Peter,

Hi again, it’s Max the dog. I know it’s the weekend, but I just had to reach out today to tell you about the last couple days I’ve had. I’m still in training for email writing, so I’m sorry for any typos, but I think I’m making a lot of paw-gress.

In addition to being the ideal candidate for Maryland governor, John is the ideal person to sit near when hanging out underneath the Thanksgiving dinner table. His commitment to ensuring equal oPUPortunity never falters, and he shared a few bites of the most delicious meal I’ve ever tasted – is that what you people eat all the time? I’m jealous.

I should have known to stop there, but while the pug-kin pie was being passed around, I noticed John was distracted talking about his upcoming November fundraising deadline and I was able to sneak a small morsel when he wasn’t looking... name: Matt Castelli
subject: She’s literally RUNNING from her record
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Castelli for Congress
body:
| Team,

Elise Stefanik’s betrayal isn’t new — in fact, it goes back to the very beginning when she first ran for Congress in 2014.

During her campaign, she claimed that she wanted to “protect and preserve” Medicare and Social Security, but her record shows otherwise. If she supports our seniors, why did she vote to turn Medicare into a voucher program and why did she vote to take trillions of dollars from Social Security?

Hello,
I am emailing you today to ask you to give $5 to help me defeat Chuck Grassley, turn Iowa blue, and protect our Democratic majority in the Senate.
Here’s why: I am running in one of the most important Senate races in the country. Control of the Senate is at stake here in Iowa. **But with just two days until our critical end-of-month deadline, we’re still falling short of our $100,000 fundraising goal and what we need to win.**
My Senate race will be one of the closest in the country next year. It will also be one of the most expensive. But I’m not taking money from corporate PACs; instead, I’m relying entirely on grassroots donors like you to fund my campaign.
We have to hit this goal if I’m going to be able to run a fully-funded campaign and take on all of Chuck Grassley and Mitch McConnell’s Super PAC millions. **I can’t afford to fall short now. There’s still time to raise the shortfall, but I’m counting on grassroots donors like you to give right now:**
[**Please, will you give $5 or more right now – every dollar you can afford before our critical end-of-month deadline – to help me defeat Chuck Grassley, turn Iowa blue, and protect our Democratic majority?**](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/4PfL751D8g4IfLXFw3QfXV5Wo_6TP_ujTmJFoO05AE1kXvT_Q9tki0_GCcDtiDHFCiKFP7igMykCvahsh6EtHEHcAsmPN6FlHezii-foQMHWSeJSrKbQKtHeEzAcfJHmwhifBXKb5nr615MCGQqOMAEkfNth_p3fzyebCeEbWjkucwL43vMEbE9ONCQYP_8YG4vICICtedPxVc-wdZ1szoDvXDMawuh1hgl_0S6HaroM6Lle1rDkDUGg3wHp5X16YFUZOoojYQqzgQYBSe0zyghBuinFRGzzIoyAPj-ziI7G-cqjJb554wEzOt2ESXeINoMomk8VFiRTzJYJbLIV7XvXiy5J6E9zjqTMyPZpl7hJ5ZEeW2r_T6kajwIWf3SWZ2BEZ_Oq777aQXdx7pdfJfEUMhwwTKUowr2djJUU0Wd5s4HuhmKdQQIHa9mXapRpNSw3S_x8h9A2XvEhOCdLdNBf_4vZ4u_wz7zL-dUv6pp4Amwj78oNW2NPay_GWFs4/3he/2dx8wrULQgijjCduci5ezQ/h1/lhS5Ea54UjQ3EdIXQtzzi9e1HFlknIYDi1QUv7O2b1o)

| | | **BREAKING: The New York Times calls Susan Wild one of the “Democrats facing the toughest re-elections in politically competitive districts”**
---
Peter,

Did you see what the New York Times said about our campaign? They said Susan is facing one of the “toughest re-elections” in the nation. We’ve known this for a while, but now it’s starting to get national attention. We know Susan can fight off Republican attacks and defend her seat — as long as she has grassroots support from folks like you. [_**With just two days until our campaign’s crucial end-of-month fundraising deadline, will you contribute to Susan’s campaign right away to ensure she has the resources to stay in Congress?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39083698/318356912/-1089111386?refcode=BLU-SWC-20211128-1-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODczMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiN2E2NzBjYS03ZDUwLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wiFz0C_-Y6Q5FswQmqkwJh_WlKTEydjeNxeUcWzNshM=)
| [SUPPORT SUSAN ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39083699/318356913/-1089111386?refcode=BLU-SWC-20211128-1-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODczMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiN2E2NzBjYS03ZDUwLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wiFz0C_-Y6Q5FswQmqkwJh_WlKTEydjeNxeUcWzNshM=)

name: National Republican Polling
subject: Flawed and outdated?
body:
The events of the last year have no precedent in our nation’s history. They’ve shaken me, and I’m sure they’ve affected
_Sponsored message_
This sponsored message from National Republican Polling is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zh29qiq339cbdqbe2rl4ogirmna70l1e9d0grmuo_rp22sh2s8i66pj0shh66o34clh2bs) Dear Fellow American, The events of the last year have no precedent in our nation’s history. They’ve shaken me, and I’m sure they’ve affected you as well. Throughout it all, you may have noticed a recurring theme from the progressives in the media, Big Tech, and politics. They insist that the government designed by our Founding Fathers, as expressed in the Constitution, is **flawed** and **outdated** —not adequate for the challenges of our time. How should defenders of the Constitution, like you and me, respond to such charges? Well, a few early champions of the Constitution—Alexander Hamilton, John Jay, and James Madison—have given you the guide: _The Federalist Papers_. Written between October 1787 and August 1788 under the pen name Publius, _The Federalist Papers_ were originally published as newspaper editorials intended to explain the merits of the Constitution. Thomas Jefferson described _The Federalist Papers_ as “the best commentary on the principles of government which ever was written.” That means that defenders of the Constitution have no better help in understanding the principles of liberty underlying our Constitution than the words of the Founders themselves. **So, I’d like to send you our entire 10-lesson course, “ _The Federalist Papers_ ,”on DVD today with a donation of $100 or more to Hillsdale College.** _**“The Federalist Papers”**_ course comes in a beautiful DVD box set for viewing in your home or a small group. You might also find it useful for a homeschool curriculum or personal study. It’s taught by Hillsdale’s knowledgeable faculty and will deepen your understanding of this incredibly relevant document even more. The DVD can also make an excellent gift for a friend or family member unfamiliar with our nation’s founding principles of liberty. [](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2z4f1pjih8qgpo8a111sdkd51qu3m8lruttclfn98_rp22sh2s8i66pj0shh66o34clh2bs) Supplies are limited, though, so get this special edition of **_“The Federalist Papers”_** on DVD today. Given that more than 200,000 people have taken this course already, you can bet the DVD box set won’t last long. Click here to learn more about this DVD and order your copy of _**“The Federalist Papers”**_ today: [**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-federalist-papers**](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2z53ju5dmroaivq5vrdir9e6nl0vp9tnlr0tjob68_rp22sh2s8i66pj0shh66o34clh2bs) Warm regards, Bill Gray Class of 2001 Associate Vice President of National Donor Outreach Hillsdale College
---

name: James Carville
subject: Listen up, friend!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Val Demings for U
body:
| | |
---
**Listen up, friend!**
Congresswoman Val Demings is down 2 points in her race to defeat Marco Rubio. It's one of the hottest Senate races in the country – and I have zero doubt in my mind that Val Demings can win this. But Val Demings can ONLY win if activists like YOU dig deep and support her every step of the way.
So here's what I'm dropping in to tell you: Flipping Florida blue can decide our Democratic Senate majority. And CNN is calling Florida's Senate seat one of the most likely to flip in 2022 – but Florida's last Senate race was decided by just 0.12 percent (that's only 10,033 votes).
That's why moments like this can make or break a campaign. Especially when up against a right-wing incumbent like Marco Rubio, who is already sitting on a multi-million-dollar war chest and has the full GOP establishment behind him. **So I committed to helping Val Demings raise $55,000 before her midnight deadline tonight, and I'm counting on your contribution to get us there, friend: **
**[Will you rush $5 or more now to help Val Demings defeat Marco Rubio, flip Florida blue and expand our Democratic Senate majority?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39083894/318357802/-892300846?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1782-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmODY2ZDExMS03ZTUwLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vujj5Af7H8VfQJoMv-WWDBamEbgTqCz8AgXv2uHQ0Hs=)**
From the White House to the campaign trail, I've seen it all. More than most. I've seen what it takes to win, and I've seen what happens when campaigns fail to muster enough grassroots momentum. I'm told Val Demings has one of the strongest grassroots teams in Democratic politics – and trust me, I was relieved to hear it.

That's why we need Val Demings. She's gone toe-to-toe with some of the most extreme Republicans. She impeached Donald Trump and prosecuted him in the Senate. clean_body: We are committed to having positive momentum as we head into next month = Peter, Our brand new campaign is getting underway, and it’s already time for us to wrap up our first month! The support we have received thus far has reinforced my hope for Oregon’s future. But I am a candidate who is running on facts, and the fact is that hope and support alone are not enough for us to win this race. We need to build a strong network and a fortified team in order to come out on top. Every dollar coming into this campaign is a commitment from the people of Oregon to the basic principles of truth, equality, and progress. We’re sending a clear message that Oregonians want a new vision for their new district, and that our goals are bold and blue. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = | | = | = | | = | = | | = Thanks for your support, Kathleen Harder, M.D. = Paid for by Dr. Kathleen Harder for Congress Dr. Kathleen Harder for Congress P.O. body:
&n; bsp;
Not interested? [Unsubscribe Here](https://trk.cp20.com/form?2ycpj--fgxr-4qqlpo7&sl=2d&t=5&ac=gh7s)

Hello! My name is Sam over at Republican HQ. I have a quick question that I was hoping to get your opinion on. [**Right now my data is incomplete -- could you spare ten seconds to answer this one question?**](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-2ycpj-1mr5o-4qqlpo9/)
As I’m sure you’ve heard, my favorite President -- Donald J. Trump -- is launching a brand new social media app. I’m so excited to sign up! But when I was combing through the thousands of Patriots who pledged to join, **I was disappointed to see your name not on our official list...**
I know you’re busy but could you do me a favor and respond in the next 10 minutes? _I promise to not bug you again! So will you join?_
**[Yes: I Stand With Trump >>](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-2ycpj-1mr5p-4qqlpo0/)**
**[No: I Don’t Support Trump >>](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-2ycpj-1mr5q-4qqlpo1/)**
President Trump is building his very own platform to stop Big Tech from controlling what we can and can’t see... censoring strong Conservative voices... and blacklisting content they don’t agree with.... _And the Liberals are desperate to stop him._
**Thousands have already signed a petition to BAN his app from the Apple and Google app stores -- they’ll do ANYTHING to stop him.**
President Trump needs to know we have his back.
[**So would you join? I’ll be on the lookout for your answer in 10 minutes from now.**](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-2ycpj-1mr5r-4qqlpo2/)
Thanks for all you do.
\-- Sam
_Republican HQ (From The GOP Whip Office)_

subject: Our freedoms are worth fighting for
body:
Tina won’t give up. |

https://secure.winred.com/tina-ramirez-for-congress-inc/november-end-of-month-freedom?amount=10&utm_medium=email&utm_source=mc&utm_campaign=20211128_tinaramirezcom_november-end-of-month-freedom
Friend,

We’ll get right to it. We’re still $8,460 behind on our November goal while wannabe moderate, Abigail Spanberger, surges ahead in fundraising.

But WE are NOT going to be defeated.

Tina is a single mom and small business owner. She's a hard worker and approaches every single situation in life from a position of strength, NOT weakness.

And she has never met an obstacle that she hasn’t overcome, and being behind in fundraising isn’t going to stop her now.

So, to ensure we crush this goal, we can unlock a 2X-IMPACT for one hour, but only after we hit the halfway mark.

Please make a contribution to help us CRUSH this goal to ensure we have every dollar we need to fight back against Abigail Spanberger, and together let’s TAKE BACK VIRGINIA. (https://secure.winred.com/tina-ramirez-for-congress-inc/november-end-of-month-freedom?amount=10&utm_medium=email&utm_source=mc&utm_campaign=20211128_tinaramirezcom_november-end-of-month-freedom)

CONTRIBUTE $100 (https://secure.winred.com/tina-ramirez-for-congress-inc/november-end-of-month-freedom?amount=100&utm_medium=email&utm_source=mc&utm_campaign=20211128_tinaramirezcom_november-end-of-month-freedom)

CONTRIBUTE $50 (https://secure.winred.com/tina-ramirez-for-congress-inc/november-end-of-month-freedom?amount=50&utm_medium=email&utm_source=mc&utm_campaign=20211128_tinaramirezcom_november-end-of-month-freedom)

CONTRIBUTE $25 (https://secure.winred.com/tina-ramirez-for-congress-inc/november-end-of-month-freedom?amount=25&utm_medium=email&utm_source=mc&utm_campaign=20211128_tinaramirezcom_november-end-of-month-freedom)

CONTRIBUTE $10 (https://secure.winred.com/tina-ramirez-for-congress-inc/november-end-of-month-freedom?amount=10&utm_medium=email&utm_source=mc&utm_campaign=20211128_tinaramirezcom_november-end-of-month-freedom)

CONTRIBUTE MORE (https://secure.winred.com/tina-ramirez-for-congress-inc/november-end-of-month-freedom?utm_medium=email&utm_source=mc&utm_campaign=20211128_tinaramirezcom_november-end-of-month-freedom)

Abigail is proof that even Democrats know their party is getting too radical for most Americans -- and she tries to distance herself from Pelosi every chance she gets.

But at the end of the day, she’s still a Democrat. And today being a Democrat means you want to force CRT in our schools, it means you want to strip Americans of their Constitutional rights, and it means you support grotesque government overspending.

Those policies aren’t good enough for Tina and her family, and they aren’t good enough for you either.
That’s why we have to crush this fundraising goal, to show the Democrats that no matter how moderate they pretend to be, their radical policies are anti-American, and we will NOT support them.

But even though we are working as hard as we can to get the job done, we simply won’t be able to do it without your help,
Friend.

So please, make a contribution before the end-of-month deadline, and let’s take back this Congressional seat from wannabe moderate Abigail Spanberger. (https://secure.winred.com/tina-ramirez-for-congress-inc/november-end-of-month-freedom?amount=10&utm_medium=email&utm_source=mc&utm_campaign=20211128_tinaramirezcom_november-end-of-month-freedom)

Thank you,

Team Ramirez

Charles isn’t running for Congress for his own political gain, popularity, or to line his pockets with money from special interests. Charles is a man who votes his conscience, and when he’s in Congress, his allegiance will lie with the good people of North Carolina.
In the North Carolina General Assembly, Charles fought diligently to make sure the new state budget included $10 million for our state's Indian Tribes. He filed a bill to establish an American Indian Heritage Commission, spoke out when Republicans imposed legislation to ban critical race theory in schools, and sponsored a bill to make it harder for corporations to pollute marginalized and rural communities.
You can expect him to fight for these measures and more at the federal level when he’s elected the first Native American representative from North Carolina.

body:
| | | As we turn up the heat in NY3, knocking on doors, racking up grassroots endorsements and talking to voters about what matters most – our momentum is exploding.
That’s because **Democratic voters want a fighter** , a representative who puts their families first and someone that can bring our party back together.
They know when I get to D.C., I will fight to deliver Medicare for All, a Green New Deal and to raise the minimum wage to a true living wage so all of our families can thrive.
**Now, my primary opponent, Rep. Tom Suozzi, is looking for a new opportunity, openly considering running for Governor or a position in the New York City mayor’s office.**
******[This could become one of the most competitive open Democratic districts in America, a MUST-WIN seat to stop Republicans from taking over the House. subject: Sorry!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Matt Brown for Governor and Friends of Cynthia
body:
Folks,

We weren’t planning on sending out an email today (sorry!) but we took a
look at our fundraising numbers and have some good news:

With a few days left to go, we’re closing in on our November fundraising
goal. That means that your donation could be the one that puts our team
over the top!

If you can, please chip in $3 or any amount to help hit our end-of-month
goal. We’re building a people-powered movement, and your support is

name: Alex Padilla for California
subject: Asking for your endorsement today
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Alex Padilla for Senate
body:
#

Working people across California are standing with Alex Padilla!
Here’s just a few of the labor unions that have endorsed Alex Padilla’s campaign for U.S. Senate:
* California Federation of Teachers
* California Teachers Association
* National Nurses United
* SEIU California
* United Farm Workers

[**Can you join them by adding your name here to personally endorse Alex Padilla’s campaign? It would mean a lot to have you on our team.**](https://act.alex-padilla.com/signup/Personal-Endorsement-Nov21?source=em211128-1-subs&akid=466%2E159979%2ENE75ue)
[](https://act.alex-padilla.com/signup/Personal-Endorsement-Nov21?source=em211128-1-subs&akid=466%2E159979%2ENE75ue)
**[ENDORSE ALEX](https://act.alex-padilla.com/signup/Personal-Endorsement-Nov21?source=em211128-1-subs&akid=466%2E159979%2ENE75ue)**
From reforming our broken immigration system to protecting voting rights from Republican attacks, Alex is working hard in the Senate to pass progressive policy so that ALL Californians have the opportunity to succeed.
That’s why workers across California are supporting Alex, and it’s why we’re asking for your support today. Because the ONLY way to make sure we keep Alex in the Senate is with an unprecedented grassroots movement of supporters like you.
**So what do you say?**
[**Before the weekend comes to a close, will you add your name to stand with workers across California and endorse Alex Padilla for U.S. Senate?**](https://act.alex-padilla.com/signup/Personal-Endorsement-Nov21?source=em211128-1-subs&akid=466%2E159979%2ENE75ue)
**[ENDORSE ALEX](https://act.alex-padilla.com/signup/Personal-Endorsement-Nov21?source=em211128-1-subs&akid=466%2E159979%2ENE75ue)**
Endorsing Alex and being a part of this team means taking on special interests, fighting for people — not corporations — and defending the dream that so many of us are striving for.
So thank you for standing with Alex and supporting our campaign. When we win this race and send Alex back to the Senate, know that it will be because people like you got involved.
\- Team Padilla

Paid For By Alex Padilla for Senate
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com . Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you, but if you want to, you can [ unsubscribe here.](https://act.alex-padilla.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=1&akid=466%2E159979%2ENE75ue)

name: Team Kilmer
subject: Throwing another wrench into the mix
disclaimer_text: Paid for by People for Derek Kilmer
body:
Peter,

We hope you had a happy and healthy Thanksgiving holiday! Before you heat up your leftovers, we wanted to give a brief update on our end-of-month fundraising goal.

The midterm elections are less than a year away, which means we can't afford to take our foot off the gas for even a second. Republicans only have to flip FIVE seats to take back control of the House, so we aren't taking a single seat for granted.

To throw another wrench into the mix: redistricting is _still_ underway in Washington. Once maps are finalized, we'll have even less time to reach all the new voters in Derek's district next year. **All of this makes meeting our fundraising goals even more critical, so we 're asking:**

**[Will you rush a donation before Tuesday at midnight to help us meet our $10,000 end-of-month fundraising goal? It'll mean so much to Derek to see your name on our final monthly fundraising report, so if you're able, please chip in $5, $10, or whatever you can.](https://act.myngp.com/el/XKCL0f4LRLvi9zWk8QsQA8jB1KSCAEjnNHPeE0YrQpo=/qNe6q9Ju_rwi6WChahwhsxbrICDPQHysHtKqO-ABLcw=?refcode=em21_211128_eom1_fndd_gq_act___TK_ettx&utm_campaign=em21_211128_eom1_fndd_gq_act___TK_ettx&utm_medium=email)**

name: JohnFetterman.com
subject: re: the moment you've been waiting for
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
It's not really an exaggeration to say that this Tuesday marks the single most important deadline our campaign has faced so far.
#
Derek,
With just TWO days to go before our big end-of-month fundraising deadline for November, our finance team wanted to reach out directly:
**According to the records we have on file,****you've never chipped in to John Fetterman's campaign to fight for us in the U.S. Senate... _yet!_**
[**Any chance at all that you could send $5 our way right now to get your first generous donation on the books?**](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/37746?refcode=em20211128-3612&t=1&akid=3612%2E434096%2EOSE3qk)
Take a look at your full record from our files: 👀
**_Derek's Official Team Fetterman Record_** **Email:** dpwillis67@gmail.com **2021 Donor:** No — not yet! **2021 Total:** $0.00 **Suggested Donation: $5** **[Donate Now](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/37746?refcode=em20211128-3612&t=2&akid=3612%2E434096%2EOSE3qk)**
---
We're now just two days away from our deadline, and we still have a few thousand more dollars to raise in order to hit our goal before the month is out.
Not to alarm you, Derek, but if we come up short, we risk having to make cuts to our organizing plan — and that's something we just can't afford in a race as competitive and important as this one.
As we close in on the final month before 2022 officially begins, it's not an exaggeration to say that this Tuesday at midnight could mark the single most important deadline our campaign has faced so far.
**So, Derek, if you've been waiting for that perfect moment to make your first-ever donation to John's grassroots campaign, we're emailing you today to say that NOW is that time.**
[**Will you donate $5 to help close the gap on our goal before it's too late? We're really hoping to see an uptick in donations before our deadline, especially from Cresco, so we hope you'll chip in if you can.**](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/37746?refcode=em20211128-3612&t=3&akid=3612%2E434096%2EOSE3qk)
**[Contribute $5](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/37746?refcode=em20211128-3612&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=22&akid=3612%2E434096%2EOSE3qk)**
Thank you so much for your support,
— Team Fetterman HQ
P.S. Is this correct, Derek? Our records indicate that you've never chipped in John's campaign since he announced he's running to flip this open PA Senate seat. [**If your budget allows, will you quickly donate $5 before Tuesday's deadline to get on the record as an official grassroots donor to John's campaign? We wouldn't ask if it weren't so important.**](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/37746?refcode=em20211128-3612&t=23&akid=3612%2E434096%2EOSE3qk)

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20211128-3612-footer&t=24&refcode2=3612_434096_OSE3qk&akid=3612%2E434096%2EOSE3qk)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/JohnFettermanPA/) | [](https://twitter.com/johnfetterman) | [](https://www.instagram.com/johnfetterman/)
Email us: info@johnfetterman.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Fetterman for PA, PO Box 6061, Pittsburgh PA 15211.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.johnfetterman.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.johnfetterman.com/sign/personal_info/?t=25&akid=3612%2E434096%2EOSE3qk)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.johnfetterman.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=26&akid=3612%2E434096%2EOSE3qk)

Paid for by Fetterman for PA.

name: Mark Kelly
subject: A single seat could make all the difference
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DSCC | PO Box 96047, Washington, DC 20090 | **[dscc
body:
| | | [](https://go.dscc.org/go/3591?amount=5&t=4&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50%2C100%2C150%2C250&code=DPE-FM-20211128-Kelly-DSCCOriginal-ETG-sl1&refcode=DPE-FM-20211128-Kelly-DSCCOriginal-ETG-sl1&akid=2051%2E9716520%2EbLeOnT) | | [CHIP IN $5](https://go.dscc.org/go/3591?amount=5&t=7&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50%2C100%2C150%2C250&code=DPE-FM-20211128-Kelly-DSCCOriginal-ETG-sl1&refcode=DPE-FM-20211128-Kelly-DSCCOriginal-ETG-sl1&akid=2051%2E9716520%2EbLeOnT)
---
Your contribution will be split between Mark Kelly for Senate and the DSCC to keep Arizona and the Senate blue.
This month, we proved what’s possible when we dream big and reach for the stars.

The bipartisan infrastructure bill that I helped shape and pass was just signed into law and will soon help repair roads, bridges, and highways; ensure everyone has clean drinking water; promote clean energy; and so much more.

This is a prime example of why I ran for Senate in the first place: to make life better for hardworking Arizonans. **But unfortunately, National Republicans are more concerned with scoring political points than making real progress.**

**[They've already spent millions to defeat us, so I’m teaming up with the DSCC to raise $25,000 by midnight to fight back. Will you split a $5 donation between my campaign and the DSCC to help defend Arizona’s seat and hold the Senate?](https://go.dscc.org/go/3591?amount=5&t=8&amount=5&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50%2C100%2C150%2C250&code=DPE-FM-20211128-Kelly-DSCCOriginal-ETG-sl1&refcode=DPE-FM-20211128-Kelly-DSCCOriginal-ETG-sl1&akid=2051%2E9716520%2EbLeOnT)**

Friend, we knew from the beginning that my re-election wouldn’t be easy, and here’s where we stand right now:

I already have five opponents working to defeat our people-powered campaign. One of them just committed to spending $50 million in this race. And two national organizations just changed our race rating from Lean Democratic to Toss Up.

**I won my election last year by just _two points_ , and these National Republican groups will do — and spend — whatever it takes to take back this seat.**

With the Senate hanging on by just one seat, and Americans across the country depending on us to make real change for them, I need grassroots supporters like you to help me win another narrow victory — so please:

**[Will you split $5 or more between my campaign and the DSCC to ensure we reach tonight’s $25,000 goal and hold the Senate?](https://go.dscc.org/go/3591?amount=5&t=9&amount=5&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50%2C100%2C150%2C250&code=DPE-FM-20211128-Kelly-DSCCOriginal-ETG-sl1&refcode=DPE-FM-20211128-Kelly-DSCCOriginal-ETG-sl1&akid=2051%2E9716520%2EbLeOnT)** If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately and split between Mark Kelly and the DSCC. | [Donate $5](https://go.dscc.org/go/3591?amount=5&t=10&amount=5&express_lane=true&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50%2C100%2C150%2C250&code=DPE-FM-20211128-Kelly-DSCCOriginal-ETG-sl1&refcode=DPE-FM-20211128-Kelly-DSCCOriginal-ETG-sl1&akid=2051%2E9716520%2EbLeOnT)

| [Donate $25](https://go.dscc.org/go/3591?amount=5&t=12&amount=25&express_lane=true&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50%2C100%2C150%2C250&code=DPE-FM-20211128-Kelly-DSCCOriginal-ETG-sl1&refcode=DPE-FM-20211128-Kelly-DSCCOriginal-ETG-sl1&akid=2051%2E9716520%2EbLeOnT)

****Thank you so much for your help,

Mark Kelly
U.S. Senator, Arizona

[](https://go.dscc.org/go/3591?amount=5&t=14&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50%2C100%2C150%2C250&code=DPE-FM-20211128-Kelly-DSCCOriginal-ETG-sl1&refcode=DPE-FM-20211128-Kelly-DSCCOriginal-ETG-sl1&akid=2051%2E9716520%2EbLeOnT)
Former U.S. Navy combat pilot, engineer, and NASA astronaut Mark Kelly is running for re-election in Arizona. He's fighting to create good-paying jobs, cut taxes for middle-class families, and lower costs.

**[Will you help Mark Kelly and the DSCC fight back against National Republicans and hold the Senate?](https://go.dscc.org/go/3591?amount=5&t=5&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50%2C100%2C150%2C250&code=DPE-FM-20211128-Kelly-DSCCOriginal-ETG-sl1&refcode=DPE-FM-20211128-Kelly-DSCCOriginal-ETG-sl1&akid=2051%2E9716520%2EbLeOnT)**

name: Team LBR
subject: December is just around the corner
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lisa Blunt Rochester for Congress**
body:
But we’ve got some work to do before we start thinking about the holidays

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39085664/318368050/326428347?refcode=EM_FR_211128eom_eom_tlbr_4_NG_Nlogo&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjg3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ODY3ZDg0NS04ODUwLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=RC8JwmBlzsjBOUEfE364o9CvgSbZDoU1XfMj3k4EcF4=) [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39085665/318368051/326428347?refcode=EM_FR_211128eom_eom_tlbr_4_NG_Nlogo&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjg3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ODY3ZDg0NS04ODUwLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=RC8JwmBlzsjBOUEfE364o9CvgSbZDoU1XfMj3k4EcF4=) Is it just us, or did December really sneak up on everyone this year?

name: Gabby Giffords
subject: I’m respectfully asking you to help my husband, Mark Kelly, knock his November fundraising goal out of the park. Will you pitch in anything you can?
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
body:
#

Friends —
I’m reaching out today to ask you to support my husband, Mark, so he can hold this Arizona Senate seat. Please, give me a chance to explain why this is so important.
I personally know just how hard these campaigns can be. National Republicans see people like Mark, who is independent and puts his constituents first, as a problem. That’s why we have always known that outside groups would come out of the woodwork to spend untold amounts of money to try and take back this Senate seat in 2022.
And they’ve already started.
One candidate has the backing of a $10 million super PAC. Another has promised to personally spend $50 million in this race. National Republicans have already spent millions of dollars attacking Mark. And Donald Trump flew to Arizona to hold a rally and said, “Taking America back begins with kicking Mark Kelly the hell out of the United States Senate.”
So, it's clear Trump and National Republicans are already ramping up their efforts to beat Mark.
Mark needs our help to fight off these attacks, and the best way to do that is by reaching his 50,000 contribution goal by the end of our November fundraising drive.
We can’t afford to fall short, so what do you say?
[**If you are able, will you make a $3 donation to Mark’s people-powered campaign? We set a 50,000 contribution goal because we want to show the strength of this campaign, thousands of people like you chipping in a few bucks at a time. We’re counting on you to help get us there.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-nov21?refcode=em211128-1-15&t=1&refcode2=1717_6688874_jzCMgq&akid=1717%2E6688874%2EjzCMgq)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_
| | **[Donate $3](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-nov21?express_lane=true&amount=3&refcode=em211128-1-15&t=20&refcode2=1717_6688874_jzCMgq&akid=1717%2E6688874%2EjzCMgq)**
---
****
| **[Donate $25](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-nov21?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=em211128-1-15&t=21&refcode2=1717_6688874_jzCMgq&akid=1717%2E6688874%2EjzCMgq)**
---
****
| | **[Donate $50](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-nov21?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=em211128-1-15&t=22&refcode2=1717_6688874_jzCMgq&akid=1717%2E6688874%2EjzCMgq)**
---
****
| **[Donate $100](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-nov21?express_lane=true&amount=100&refcode=em211128-1-15&t=23&refcode2=1717_6688874_jzCMgq&akid=1717%2E6688874%2EjzCMgq)**
---
****
| | **[Donate $250](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-nov21?express_lane=true&amount=250&refcode=em211128-1-15&t=24&refcode2=1717_6688874_jzCMgq&akid=1717%2E6688874%2EjzCMgq)**
---
****
| **[Other Amount](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-nov21?express_lane=true&refcode=em211128-1-15&t=25&refcode2=1717_6688874_jzCMgq&akid=1717%2E6688874%2EjzCMgq)**
---
****
Mark is working so hard for Arizona in the Senate. To hold this seat, he is going up against National Republicans and outside groups that want to stop us. That’s why your support, no matter the amount, is greatly appreciated by me, Mark, and all of us.
I can’t thank you enough for the amount of support you’ve shown so far — now, let’s keep up the momentum!
All my best,
Gabby Giffords

Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you, but if you want to, you can [ unsubscribe here](https://act.markkelly.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=26&akid=1717%2E6688874%2EjzCMgq).
Mark Kelly was a Captain in the U.S. Navy and astronaut. Use of his military rank, job titles and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or Department of Defense and reference to NASA does not imply endorsement by the National Aeronautics and Space Administration.

name: Dena Cranley
subject: You stepped up when I asked last month. Now, I need to ask for your support again.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the John Cranley Committee
body:
We're writing a comeback story for Ohio. | Hey there! At the end of last month, my husband and I made a bet. I told him that I thought I could raise more money in 24 hours than he could. **And guess what — I was right!** I was so honored to have so many of you stand with me to support our campaign. Now, I need to ask for your help again, but let me explain first. I believe in a better future for Ohio. I believe that we can bring back jobs, repair failing infrastructure, invest in our climate’s future, improve our public schools, and do what it takes to write a comeback story for our state. **And I believe that electing my husband governor is the way we kickstart that comeback — but he’ll only make it to Columbus with your help.** **_[If you’re with us in the fight for Ohio’s future, please, chip in $25 or whatever you can right now>>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39085759/318368747/-1406512299?amount=25&refcode=ea.13b4f9f3-8950-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ms=ea.13b4f9f3-8950-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxM2I0ZjlmMy04OTUwLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=l_34exu0AQXy1UUaQpjLQFcRc1_LqA9Llo83NevBhpg=)_** Ohioans deserve elected officials who are true public servants and are ready to work for the best interests of our communities no matter what. Cincinnatians already know that John is that kind of leader — and they’ve seen what a comeback can look like with John at the helm. During his time as mayor, our city has lowered the poverty rate, raised income levels, added jobs, and expanded the green energy economy. I know John is the leader our state needs, too. John and I both believe that there is no greater calling than public service. Our faith guides us to do what we can to help our neighbors and leave this world better than we found it. **After more than a decade serving Cincinnati on the City Council and as mayor, John is ready to serve Ohio as governor.** John is the Democrat who can bring responsible, trustworthy government to Columbus. Your support will make it possible. **_[Can you chip in $25 or any amount that’s right for you today? clean_body: We're writing a comeback story for Ohio. | Hey there! At the end of last month, my husband and I made a bet. I told him that I thought I could raise more money in 24 hours than he could. And guess what — I was right! I was so honored to have so many of you stand with me to support our campaign. Now, I need to ask for your help again, but let me explain first. I believe in a better future for Ohio. I believe that we can bring back jobs, repair failing infrastructure, invest in our climate’s future, improve our public schools, and do what it takes to write a comeback story for our state. And I believe that electing my husband governor is the way we kickstart that comeback — but he’ll only make it to Columbus with your help. = Ohioans deserve elected officials who are true public servants and are ready to work for the best interests of our communities no matter what. Cincinnatians already know that John is that kind of leader — and they’ve seen what a comeback can look like with John at the helm. During his time as mayor, our city has lowered the poverty rate, raised income levels, added jobs, and expanded the green energy economy. I know John is the leader our state needs, too. John and I both believe that there is no greater calling than public service. Our faith guides us to do what we can to help our neighbors and leave this world better than we found it. After more than a decade serving Cincinnati on the City Council and as mayor, John is ready to serve Ohio as governor. John is the Democrat who can bring responsible, trustworthy government to Columbus. Your support will make it possible. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = = = = = = Thank you so much, Dena Cranley = John Cranley has spent his career working towards creating a fairer, more just world. Can you help us keep up the momentum from this new poll by making a $3 donation to our campaign? Wisconsin will be the tipping point for Senate control, and these numbers prove what we’ve been saying all along — Sarah is the best candidate to defeat Ron Johnson.

name: Sen. Rob Ortt
subject: Happy Hanukkah!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ROB ORTT FOR STATE SENATE
body:
| | | |
---
---
|
---
|
---
| |
---
Dear Friend,
As we close the book on November, we open another one with the celebration of Hanukkah for the next eight nights The Festival of Lights means so much for our Jewish brothers and sisters. From November 28-December 6, we are reminded of the dedication and strength of our Jewish communities worldwide. On behalf of the entire Senate Republican Conference, I wish all of my friends and neighbors a safe and Happy Hanukkah.
Sincerely,
---
|

name: Wes Moore
subject: Let me explain
body:
| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39086883/318369805/1062064798?refcode=fl_email_fr_20211128eom1_wm_30da_xx_hdr&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ1NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMzFlZDM5Ni04YzUwLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=RdsNr8k7PKlWgaGF7fA7fL0NPi1tBhCieRPRKHGakEE=)
---
Friends, You know I hate asking for money, but **with our second-to-last fundraising deadline of the year approaching in just two days, I have to ask if you can pitch in to help us reach our November goal.** But before I do, I hope you’ll let me explain how important this deadline and your contribution are to this campaign. I’m running for governor of Maryland to give every person a seat at the table and a fighting chance. That’s what our public servants should do: leave nobody behind. But for a long time, that hasn’t happened here in Maryland. Too many families have struggled to put food on the table, pay their medical bills, give their kids a good education, and make sure they have a safe and healthy environment to live in. For the first time in eight years, we have the opportunity to flip this governor’s seat and usher in fresh, bold leadership that aims to lift every Marylander up and create generational change to address generational challenges. **For that reason, this is an incredibly competitive Democratic primary, with a multitude of candidates vying for the Democratic spot on the ballot next November.** That’s why it’s crucial we continue to hit our fundraising goals every step of the way. Every dollar you give helps our campaign stand out from the rest, reach more voters across Maryland, and build a strong grassroots foundation to take on the GOP in 2022. It’s going to be a tough race, but I’ve overcome the odds before, and with your support, I know I can do it again and deliver generational results for the people of our state. **[So, with only two days left until our deadline, can you spare $10 or more to help our campaign reach our November goal and keep up the momentum into 2022?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39086884/318369806/1062064798?refcode=fl_email_fr_20211128eom1_wm_30da_xx_l1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ1NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMzFlZDM5Ni04YzUwLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=RdsNr8k7PKlWgaGF7fA7fL0NPi1tBhCieRPRKHGakEE=)** | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:

clean_body: | = Friends, You know I hate asking for money, but with our second-to-last fundraising deadline of the year approaching in just two days, I have to ask if you can pitch in to help us reach our November goal. But before I do, I hope you’ll let me explain how important this deadline and your contribution are to this campaign. I’m running for governor of Maryland to give every person a seat at the table and a fighting chance. That’s what our public servants should do: leave nobody behind. But for a long time, that hasn’t happened here in Maryland. Too many families have struggled to put food on the table, pay their medical bills, give their kids a good education, and make sure they have a safe and healthy environment to live in. For the first time in eight years, we have the opportunity to flip this governor’s seat and usher in fresh, bold leadership that aims to lift every Marylander up and create generational change to address generational challenges. For that reason, this is an incredibly competitive Democratic primary, with a multitude of candidates vying for the Democratic spot on the ballot next November. That’s why it’s crucial we continue to hit our fundraising goals every step of the way. Every dollar you give helps our campaign stand out from the rest, reach more voters across Maryland, and build a strong grassroots foundation to take on the GOP in 2022. It’s going to be a tough race, but I’ve overcome the odds before, and with your support, I know I can do it again and deliver generational results for the people of our state. = | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = = | = = | = = Thanks for everything you do, Elevate, Wes | Wes Moore is a combat veteran, a former small business owner, and the former CEO of a leading non-profit. Wes believes no matter where you start in life, you deserve an equal opportunity to succeed. He’s running to become Governor of Maryland and flip this state blue for the first time in 8 years. And we need your help to do it. | = Use of military rank, job titles and photographs in uniform do not imply endorsement from the Department of Defense. | BY AUTHORITY: WES MOORE FOR MARYLAND, LISSA MUSCATINE, TREASURER. name: Gabby Giffords
subject: Saving lives matters year-round
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
This year I hope that you’ll consider donating to Giffords to help fuel our efforts to make our communities safer from gun violence.
#

Friends,
On the first Tuesday after Thanksgiving, Americans across the country give back by making donations to support causes they believe are making a difference.
It’s called "Giving Tuesday" and this year I hope that you’ll consider donating to Giffords to help fuel our efforts to make our communities safer from gun violence.
Since I was shot nearly ten years ago, I have tried to live my life without limits—constantly setting tougher and tougher goals for myself.
But the truth is, achieving many of these goals requires the support and help of many others. I think you can probably say the same for most of the accomplishments you are proud of, or moments of adversity you overcame in your own life.
And the fight to change our nation’s gun laws is no different. The progress we’re making is because we’re in this together. And the distance we have left to go is not something anyone one of us can do alone.
So today, with just a few days left before Giving Tuesday, I am asking:
[**Can you make a $3 donation today? Your contribution will support our lifesaving work to pass universal background checks and make our communities safer from gun violence. It’s only possible if we’re in this together.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/giffords-em-nov21-eom?refcode=em211128-1-15&t=1&refcode2=1240_3935704_0Ibhs3&akid=1240%2E3935704%2E0Ibhs3)
Like you, I have always tried to give back to causes greater than myself. As part of my recovery, I’ve trained for and ridden in El Tour de Tucson, a 25-mile bicycle race that helps raise money for charity.
Today, I hope you’ll give to a cause greater than yourself as well. And I would be honored if you chose to make it on behalf of our lifesaving work to end gun violence.
You can use the link below to chip in any amount:
[**https://go.giffords.org/go/Giving-Tuesday**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/giffords-em-nov21-eom?refcode=em211128-1-15&t=2&refcode2=1240_3935704_0Ibhs3&akid=1240%2E3935704%2E0Ibhs3)
As always, thank you. Your support means the world to me.
Gabby Giffords
**[DONATE](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/giffords-em-nov21-eom?refcode=em211128-1-15&t=3&refcode2=1240_3935704_0Ibhs3&akid=1240%2E3935704%2E0Ibhs3)**

Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. www.Giffords.org
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com . We try to send only the most important information and opportunities to participate via email, but click [here](https://go.giffords.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=4&akid=1240%2E3935704%2E0Ibhs3) if you'd like to unsubscribe. Giffords PAC was started to support elected officials who step up to fight the gun violence epidemic. Thank you for standing with Gabby and the Giffords team.

| Peter,

As Thanksgiving weekend wraps up, I want to know: [_**What did you talk about with your family this weekend?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39087924/318371106/1149011976?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODM2NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNmMzM2UyNy04ZTUwLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=HXTNWn_Vx5GSzKsj5SISpHZZZ5Pmq_dje1lOLuBCt6w=&emci=11f43cf4-494d-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=e6c33e27-8e50-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=30464261)

Thanksgiving is a time where a lot of us have discussions about politics and learn some family members have some views we might not agree with. That’s why today, I’m asking you to participate in our first [_**BACKROADS PAC Thanksgiving Focus Group.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39087925/318371107/1149011976?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODM2NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNmMzM2UyNy04ZTUwLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=HXTNWn_Vx5GSzKsj5SISpHZZZ5Pmq_dje1lOLuBCt6w=&emci=11f43cf4-494d-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=e6c33e27-8e50-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=30464261)

What issue was most concerning to folks?

Was there any misinformation that you heard?

What did they think about Donald Trump making a comeback?
---
| [START NOW → ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39087926/318371109/1149011976?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODM2NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNmMzM2UyNy04ZTUwLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=HXTNWn_Vx5GSzKsj5SISpHZZZ5Pmq_dje1lOLuBCt6w=&emci=11f43cf4-494d-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=e6c33e27-8e50-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=30464261)
---
[_**By participating in our Thanksgiving Focus Group, you will provide us with even more insight into what issues people across the country are discussing around the dinner table.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39087927/318371110/1149011976?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODM2NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNmMzM2UyNy04ZTUwLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=HXTNWn_Vx5GSzKsj5SISpHZZZ5Pmq_dje1lOLuBCt6w=&emci=11f43cf4-494d-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=e6c33e27-8e50-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=30464261)

name: Norberto Gonzalez via, MarisaWoodForCongress.com
subject: Checking in (quick)
body:
Here at HQ, it's our job to make sure we meet the mark on every fundraising goal to fund those efforts. |
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39089344/318372617/883924314?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDU3NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZDVjZTNjYS04ZjUwLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=oTVqFUpKT3piYigX6DaTDS3n-c5_D8Alfj8lg16cXKs=)
Hi friend! If we haven't met yet, I'm Norberto -- Marisa's political director.

I hope you had a good Thanksgiving weekend. I enjoyed spending some time with family and friends, but I'm coming back online for the weekend to make sure we meet the mark on Tuesday's upcoming fundraising deadline.

This deadline has taken on a new urgency this month. Once again, Kevin McCarthy turned his back on the Central Valley by trying to obstruct the Bipartisan Infrastructure Framework and the Build Back Better Act.

**You may not know this about me friend, but my dad was actually a proud farmworker here in the Central Valley. We know the price our community pays every time McCarthy tries to block legislation that would expand roads and waterways, alleviate wildfires, and protect against extreme weather conditions.**

With redistricting wrapping up soon, that means new voters to communicate with. Here at HQ, it's our job to make sure we meet the mark on every fundraising goal to fund our outreach efforts. We're close, but we need to raise $5,991 before midnight to stay on track.

**[Can you chip in a donation of $3 to Marisa's campaign right now? clean_body: Here at HQ, it's our job to make sure we meet the mark on every fundraising goal to fund those efforts. | = Hi friend! If we haven't met yet, I'm Norberto -- Marisa's political director. I hope you had a good Thanksgiving weekend. I enjoyed spending some time with family and friends, but I'm coming back online for the weekend to make sure we meet the mark on Tuesday's upcoming fundraising deadline. This deadline has taken on a new urgency this month. Once again, Kevin McCarthy turned his back on the Central Valley by trying to obstruct the Bipartisan Infrastructure Framework and the Build Back Better Act. You may not know this about me friend, but my dad was actually a proud farmworker here in the Central Valley. We know the price our community pays every time McCarthy tries to block legislation that would expand roads and waterways, alleviate wildfires, and protect against extreme weather conditions. With redistricting wrapping up soon, that means new voters to communicate with. Here at HQ, it's our job to make sure we meet the mark on every fundraising goal to fund our outreach efforts. | | Team, President Harry Truman famously had a plaque on his desk that said: “The Buck Stops Here.” No matter the problem, Truman knew that as the person in charge, he was responsible. **For Governor Baker, the buck seems to stop... well, anywhere else.** **We need a governor who is interested in solving problems, instead of just avoiding blame for them. We need a governor who knows where the buck stops. We need to elect Sonia Chang-Díaz. ** [_**If you agree, chip in $15 today to help reach our end-of-month goal.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39089435/318372689/-911119298?refcode=em_20211128_f_t_eom2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTMxMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwYTQzMzlmZS04ZjUwLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=sCS77KN7xPTqYTpvKkqXYSf4H2gDP4RQlN5mIvjT0w8=) From the Holyoke Soldiers Home to dangerous breakdowns of our public transit system to COVID-19 testing and vaccine equity, Baker ignores problems until they get too big. It’s got to stop. Sonia doesn’t pass the buck. When she sees a problem that state leaders have ignored for years, she takes it on and solves it, instead of letting it continue to fester. For years, it was clear that our state was chronically shortchanging low-income schools, but Beacon Hill didn’t take action. Until Sonia got involved. She didn’t hesitate, and she built a grassroots coalition to win a new funding formula to better support all of our kids. **A governor can solve problems before they become crises, or a governor can blame others when things get really bad. We know which one we’d rather have.** [_**If you agree, can you chip in $15 to help elect Sonia? Make your contribution today.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39089441/318372690/-911119298?refcode=em_20211128_f_t_eom2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTMxMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwYTQzMzlmZS04ZjUwLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=sCS77KN7xPTqYTpvKkqXYSf4H2gDP4RQlN5mIvjT0w8=) Let’s do this, Team Sonia

clean_body: We need a governor who is interested in solving problems, instead of just avoiding blame for them. We need a governor who knows where the buck stops. We need to elect Sonia Chang-Díaz. | | | | | Team, President Harry Truman famously had a plaque on his desk that said: “The Buck Stops Here.” No matter the problem, Truman knew that as the person in charge, he was responsible. For Governor Baker, the buck seems to stop... well, anywhere else. We need a governor who is interested in solving problems, instead of just avoiding blame for them. We need a governor who knows where the buck stops. We need to elect Sonia Chang-Díaz. = From the Holyoke Soldiers Home to dangerous breakdowns of our public transit system to COVID-19 testing and vaccine equity, Baker ignores problems until they get too big. It’s got to stop. Sonia doesn’t pass the buck. When she sees a problem that state leaders have ignored for years, she takes it on and solves it, instead of letting it continue to fester. For years, it was clear that our state was chronically shortchanging low-income schools, but Beacon Hill didn’t take action. Until Sonia got involved. She didn’t hesitate, and she built a grassroots coalition to win a new funding formula to better support all of our kids. A governor can solve problems before they become crises, or a governor can blame others when things get really bad. We know which one we’d rather have. = Let’s do this, Team Sonia | | | | | = | | | | | ---|---|---|--- | | | ---|---|---|--- | | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you believe you received this email in error or wish to no longer receive emails from us, . | Paid for by the Committee to Elect Sonia Chang-Díaz

name: Chris Deluzio
subject: Corporate PACs don’t get a say in our campaign
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Chris Deluzio for CongressChris Deluzio for Congress
body:
If you’ve seen the news over the last year (or, hell, the last five or ten years), you know that our democracy is in peril, Derek.
From limitless corporate money running through our political system to the January 6 insurrection to Republican voter suppression (in Harrisburg and nationwide), we need bold action to protect and strengthen our democracy.
That’s exactly why I’m running for Congress. I won’t back down from addressing the challenges of today head on so that our kids — my kids — have the future they deserve. (If you’re all in, chip in now. But if you want to hear more about why I’m running, keep on reading.) [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/chris-deluzio-for-congress-email-q4_2021?refcode=fl_email_fr_2021EOM1_CD_op_xx_l1]
The richest of the rich and big, corporate interests have gained unhealthy power over so much of our society, our lives, and our politics.
Consolidation of industries has cost jobs, stifled competition, hurt consumers, killed small businesses, and left workers without options or bargaining power.
Those very same industries have lined the pockets of our politicians who’ve significantly rolled back protections fo workers against corporate power. They can fire you for any reason, dictate the terms of your job, and, as we’ve seen in Western PA, outsource your work at the drop of a hat.
Corporations (supported by the Republicans they fund) have lobbied hard to slash taxes and regulations, while pouring cash into our elections and enriching themselves and shareholders through huge profits, stock buybacks, and dividends.
Corporations, PACs, and special interests don’t get a say in our campaign. You do.
And when I go to Washington, I’ll stand up to big corporations and fight for our kids’ future. So, if you’re able, consider chipping in to our campaign right now. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/chris-deluzio-for-congress-email-q4_2021?refcode=fl_email_fr_2021EOM1_CD_op_xx_l2]
We’re building a grassroots campaign made up of everyday people — teachers, retired folks, nurses, veterans, and more — chipping in $5, $10, or $25 at a time. Anything you can contribute will be much appreciated.
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:

• $10 » [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/chris-deluzio-for-congress-email-q4_2021?express_lane=true&refcode=fl_email_fr_2021EOM1_CD_op_xx_abx10&amount=10]
• $25 » [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/chris-deluzio-for-congress-email-q4_2021?express_lane=true&refcode=fl_email_fr_2021EOM1_CD_op_xx_abx25&amount=25]
• $50 » [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/chris-deluzio-for-congress-email-q4_2021?express_lane=true&refcode=fl_email_fr_2021EOM1_CD_op_xx_abx50&amount=50]
• $100 » [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/chris-deluzio-for-congress-email-q4_2021?express_lane=true&refcode=fl_email_fr_2021EOM1_CD_op_xx_abx100&amount=100]
• $250 » [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/chris-deluzio-for-congress-email-q4_2021?express_lane=true&refcode=fl_email_fr_2021EOM1_CD_op_xx_abx250&amount=250]
• Other » [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/chris-deluzio-for-congress-email-q4_2021&refcode=fl_email_fr_2021EOM1_CD_op_xx_abxother]

Very respectfully,
Chris
Chris Deluzio is a voting rights lawyer and Iraq war veteran running for Congress in Pennsylvania's 17th District. He'll be a champion for our unions, fight to guarantee good healthcare for every American, take on corporate power, and advocate for bold action to protect and strengthen our democracy.
DONATE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/chris-deluzio-for-congress-email-q4_2021?refcode=fl_email_fr_2021EOM1_CD_op_xx_ftr&fn=Derek&ln=Willis&em=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&add1=&ci=Cresco&st=&pc=18326&oc=]

PO Box 16210
Pittsburgh, PA 15242
United States

body:

Marjorie Taylor Greene introduces bill to award Congressional Gold Medal to Rittenhouse
Hey team,
It’s hard to believe that Marjorie Taylor Greene’s vile beliefs could sink even lower, but she keeps finding a way. And now, she’s pushing for a Congressional Gold Medal to be awarded to Kyle Rittenhouse!
Let’s not forget: Marjorie Taylor Greene is the same person who voted AGAINST a Congressional Gold Medal for the Capitol Police who served on January 6.
We NEED to take a stand against her bigoted beliefs. That’s why we’re asking for your support of Marcus Flowers, a Democrat who is running to put an end to Marjorie Taylor Greene’s political career. Marcus Flowers has a real chance to win this race and flip this seat into Democratic hands - will you donate to his campaign today? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/emailmflowers?refcode=20211128_sq_goldmedalRS]
CONTRIBUTE » [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/emailmflowers?refcode=20211128_sq_goldmedalRS]
America deserves better than Marjorie Taylor Greene. We can’t afford another term of her bigotry in the halls of Congress.
Let's get to work,
-Stop QAnon
(via Team Flowers flor Congress)
Marcus Flowers is a Democrat running to defeat Marjorie Taylor Greene. As an Army Veteran, Marcus understands the true meaning of service and patriotism and will work tirelessly to defeat the hatred of the alt-right. This election is going to be tough, but with the help of grassroots donors like you -- anything is possible.

name: Emily Creighton
subject: re: holiday slump
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tim Ryan for Ohio
body:
[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/46?t=1001&akid=1561%2E3611125%2EOW203Y ][IMG]

Folks,

Before I go any further, I have to ask: [ https://act.timforoh.com/go/6188?t=1007&akid=1561%2E3611125%2EOW203Y ]Will you donate $25 or more to
help us reach our end-of-month goal in two days? We’re in a slump. Let me
explain...

I just pulled the numbers this morning and it looks like November is
turning out to be our worst fundraising month of the entire year. Look, we
knew the “holiday slump” would slow us down, but we didn’t expect our
numbers to plummet.

With the way things are going, we’re on track to fall $95,000 short of our
monthly goal. If we can’t catch up fast, I’m worried we’ll have to cut our
budget during the worst possible time.

We’ve got barely a month left in 2021 and it’s critical we prove that we
have a strong grassroots team. Or else Donald Trump, Mitch McConnell, and
the rest of the GOP will think we’re weak and relentlessly attack our
campaign.

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/6188?t=1008&akid=1561%2E3611125%2EOW203Y ]Folks, you can’t sit this one out. We need your help to reach
our November fundraising goal, fight back against the attacks, and flip
Ohio blue. Anything you can give -- whether it’s $3 or $30 -- matters.

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/6188?t=1009&akid=1561%2E3611125%2EOW203Y ]Donate $25 [ https://act.timforoh.com/go/6189?t=1010&akid=1561%2E3611125%2EOW203Y ]Donate $50

Your support makes all the difference. I hope you know how grateful we are
for this team.

-- Emily

Emily Creighton
Digital Fundraising Director
Team Ryan

I hope you know how grateful we are for this team. -- Emily Emily Creighton Digital Fundraising Director Team Ryan [ ][IMG] We believe that emails are the best way for our organization to stay in touch with supporters like you.
