body:
https://www.everyaction.com/ [https://www.everyaction.com/]Hi Peter,
A year ago, Harvard Kennedy School made the case [https://www.belfercenter.org/publication/why-us-congress-and-stem-experts-must-work-together] for more scientists in Congress:
" The need for scientific and technical expertise in Congress has never been greater. We live in an era of rapid technological progress that will shape society for generations to come. We need a Congress that is capable of keeping up with, and shaping, the emerging technologies of our time—like facial recognition, innovations to create a green energy future, and biotechnologies that will help us prevent the next pandemic. "
If elected I would be the FIRST person in Congress with expertise in climate change . This at a time when the Department of Defense has declared climate change the #1 threat to national security, and national and global health organizations have raised red flags regarding the health implications of climate change.
To get to Congress, I need your support. Your donation can help me reach my fundraising goal of $50,000.
Can you give $50 today?
Donate today! [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/friends-of-ashley-ward-1]
And to all of you who have already supported my campaign, thank you! Together we can bring expertise and practical experience to Congress to help us tackle our greatest challenges!

**As a stark reminder: _Republicans only need to flip 5 seats to take back our Democratic House majority._**

**Earlier this month showed us momentum is on the far-right’s side.** Republicans cleanly swept state-leadership across Virginia. Democrats who won decisively in 2017 barely won reelection in New Jersey this year. Even New Jersey State Senate Democratic Majority Leader lost his seat to a far-right Republican.

**_Put simply: History is just not on our side, Peter._** Midterm elections always favor the party out of power. Republicans are convinced they’ll win next year -- and getting even more brazen in their attacks against us.

**But here’s something we have that Republicans don’t:** _A large, dedicated grassroots army ready to defend our Democrats and protect our progress._

**So as we approach the midterm elections, we need to tap into that people power.** We need all hands on deck to raise $8,000 by Wednesday, rush resources to the frontlines, and defy history.

**[We have our work cut out for us in 2022. So can you help give us a head start and invest an early $3 -- or whatever you can afford -- to save vulnerable House Democrats? »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39092505/318374608/-35646090?amount=3&refcode=TCFC_20211128_EMDF_E1_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTE2MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMzIzNzA5NS05MzUwLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=--j-kdZYttnU9xnx1ahxH_GSarwfQlMxmFNRcTnHJds=)**

clean_body: Can I count on your support? | Peter, I’m really hoping I can count on your support ahead of my major End of Month Fundraising Deadline in just 2 days. = | = As a stark reminder: Republicans only need to flip 5 seats to take back our Democratic House majority. Earlier this month showed us momentum is on the far-right’s side. Republicans cleanly swept state-leadership across Virginia. Democrats who won decisively in 2017 barely won reelection in New Jersey this year. Even New Jersey State Senate Democratic Majority Leader lost his seat to a far-right Republican. Put simply: History is just not on our side, Peter. Midterm elections always favor the party out of power. Republicans are convinced they’ll win next year -- and getting even more brazen in their attacks against us. But here’s something we have that Republicans don’t: A large, dedicated grassroots army ready to defend our Democrats and protect our progress. So as we approach the midterm elections, we need to tap into that people power. We need all hands on deck to raise $8,000 by Wednesday, rush resources to the frontlines, and defy history. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = = = Tony | | Paid for by Tony Cárdenas For Congress P.O. Box 15320, Washington, DC 20003 www.tonycardenas.com Democrat Tony Cárdenas is a father, husband, second-generation immigrant, and a champion in Congress for working families. clean_body: We will be knocking doors all over IL-7 and virtual phone banking. | | | Dear Team, We have always known that early field mobilization is central to victory in our district. That is why we have been contacting voters for months. Now it’s time for our first big weekend of action. We are so excited!!! If you live in or near the district, we will be knocking doors all over and can’t wait for you to join us. For supporters who want to volunteer virtually, we will be hosting a big phone bank on Sunday. We know voters are ready for change. Help us make sure they know they have a choice. Choose an event and join our people powered campaign!!! See you there!! Team Kina | To give by check: Kina Collins for Congress 901 Lake Street, Unit 4093 Oak Park, IL 60301

name: Jason Lee, Beto for Texas
subject: Our goal for Tuesday
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Beto for Texas
body:
[1]Beto O'Rourke

Hi, I'm Jason
— a Deputy Campaign Manager for Beto's campaign. I wanted to introduce
myself and thank you for being a part of this people-powered movement.

Today marks two weeks since Beto launched our campaign for governor, and
everything we’ve done up to this point has been made possible by the
support of people like you.

From Brownsville and Corpus Christi to Dallas and Abilene, Beto's listened
to, learned from, and partnered with thousands of people ready to get big
things done for this state. In just a couple of days, we’re getting back
on the road again — and every mile we travel and stop we make will be
grassroots-funded.

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/50223?refcode=ema20211128-164555&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1001&akid=164555%2E444211%2EoUsbKo ]If you’d like to support Beto’s campaign, make a donation today to help
us achieve our critical $200,000 end-of-month fundraising goal. Every
contribution adds up, whether it’s five or fifty dollars.

Whether this is your first donation, or you've chipped in before, a
donation of any amount will help bring every Texan closer to our vision of
better jobs, world-class schools, and safer, healthier communities.

Instead of putting lives at risk with extreme policies on masks, guns, and
abortions, like our opponent Greg Abbott, we’re in this fight to bring
people together and make things better for Texas families. And we need you
with us.

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/50223?refcode=ema20211128-164555&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1002&akid=164555%2E444211%2EoUsbKo ]So if you can afford to, please make a contribution today to help us
continue to connect with folks across the state. You can bring us closer
to achieving our first-ever end-of-month goal by chipping in anything,
even just a few dollars.

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/50223?refcode=ema20211128-164555&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1021&akid=164555%2E444211%2EoUsbKo ]Contribute $3

Thank you,

Jason Lee
Deputy Campaign Manager, Beto for Texas

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://act.betoorourke.com/unsubscribe/bft-unsubscribe/?t=1022&akid=164555%2E444211%2EoUsbKo

Pol. Adv. Paid for by Beto for Texas.

this new district in the Austin area presents one of our best chances to pick up a Democratic seat and help turn Texas blue. |

Friend,

In a moment I'm going to ask you to [**chip in $5, $15, or even $35**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39092614/318375263/1898666321?refcode=em-112821-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NjQ2OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3YzUyZWFhYi05NTUwLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=PFjJwlICoOdpGCqVUaRPn0EQPbs0CHbgZmG33CYiLPY=) to our end-of-month deadline that hits on Tuesday. But first, let me explain why it's so important, especially right now:

**This is our first major deadline since the Texas state legislature created a new district in Austin through redistricting. While the GOP is bent on maintaining their grip on the rest of the state, this new district presents one of our best chances to pick up a Democratic seat and help Democrats win the governorship in 2022.**

We can win this race and the governorship if we can get every Democrat, independent, and moderate in Austin to come out and vote with a strong door-to-door canvassing program. But we need your help right now, so we can reach thousands of doors in time. That's where you come in:

[**With the election in just a few months, we need to hit Tuesday's fundraising deadline with tremendous success. You've been helpful already, friend -- now I'm asking if you'll consider a contribution of $5, $15, or even $35 before 11:59 pm tonight to close the $14,556 gap on our goal.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39092615/318375264/1898666321?refcode=em-112821-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NjQ2OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3YzUyZWFhYi05NTUwLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=PFjJwlICoOdpGCqVUaRPn0EQPbs0CHbgZmG33CYiLPY=) _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | | [Chip in $10 Now](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39092616/318375266/1898666321?refcode=em-112821-all-a&express_lane=true&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NjQ2OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3YzUyZWFhYi05NTUwLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=PFjJwlICoOdpGCqVUaRPn0EQPbs0CHbgZmG33CYiLPY=)

I don't have a massive campaign warchest or deep-pocketed donors to write big checks. I don't have corporate PACs or special interests and that's not the type of campaign I'd ever consider running anyway.

I need to muster as many grassroots contributions as possible. [**Chip in today >>**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39092627/318375276/1898666321?refcode=em-112821-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NjQ2OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3YzUyZWFhYi05NTUwLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=PFjJwlICoOdpGCqVUaRPn0EQPbs0CHbgZmG33CYiLPY=)

Donna

clean_body: this new district in the Austin area presents one of our best chances to pick up a Democratic seat and help turn Texas blue. | = Friend, In a moment I'm going to ask you to = to our end-of-month deadline that hits on Tuesday. But first, let me explain why it's so important, especially right now: This is our first major deadline since the Texas state legislature created a new district in Austin through redistricting. While the GOP is bent on maintaining their grip on the rest of the state, this new district presents one of our best chances to pick up a Democratic seat and help Democrats win the governorship in 2022. We can win this race and the governorship if we can get every Democrat, independent, and moderate in Austin to come out and vote with a strong door-to-door canvassing program. But we need your help right now, so we can reach thousands of doors in time. That's where you come in: = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = I don't have a massive campaign warchest or deep-pocketed donors to write big checks. I don't have corporate PACs or special interests and that's not the type of campaign I'd ever consider running anyway. I need to muster as many grassroots contributions as possible. = Thanks in advance, Donna PS. We'll have some exciting news coming soon. I want you to be amongst the first to know, so stay tuned in over email the next few days. = | = Donna Imam is a computer engineer and Democrat running for US Congress in Austin, Texas. body:
Florida is one of Democrats' BEST pickup opportunities – so we can't afford for Val Demings to fall short
| | |
---
| | **This moment is a turning point, so I pulled your supporter record so you can see where things stand:**
---
**SUPPORTER RECORD**
---
EMAIL: dpwillis67@gmail.com
EMERGENCY DONATION STATUS: **PENDING**
SUGGESTED CONTRIBUTION: $5
DEADLINE: 11:59 p.m.
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39092964/318377078/-892300846?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1774-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNDM5YjYzYi05NzUwLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0vNK_dDh97yko_4SgEMXQdWenejqqTCYi-FKmghCzRY=)
---
|
---
**Forgive the urgency, but I just had to drop into your inbox with huge news, friend:**
After Roll Call analysts named Marco Rubio the second most vulnerable GOP senator in the country, I'm falling short of the $50,000 I need to raise by midnight tonight to win in Florida. Simply put, missing this goal will force my team to make some difficult decisions in this race.
This is _not_ the time to come up short. All the indicators point to my success, to my ability to flip Florida blue and defend the Senate: Recent polling showing me within the margin of error, and The Cook Political Report has increased my chances of winning. **I'm gaining ground in my race, friend, but if I don't have the resources to seize this momentum, I risk losing this critical pickup opportunity and the Senate. **
Florida's last Senate race was decided by 0.12 points (just 10,033 votes). I'm proud of the work we are doing with President Biden to enact the Build Back Better agenda — a package that includes new measures to address the financial squeeze being felt by many American families. It will cut the costs of everything from health care to prescription drugs to child care and in-home care for seniors. It also includes historic investments to tackle the climate crisis. It's a BIG deal. **But not everyone agrees.** Mitch McConnell and the big money special interests behind him are incensed that big multinational corporations who park their profits in overseas tax havens and the very wealthy who make over $10 million per year will pay higher taxes as part of this package. That's why Mitch and his Super PAC friends are actively recruiting Maryland's Republican Governor to run against me — someone who called the Build Back Better package "far-left" and a "reckless grab bag of giveaways." [Special interests know it will only take ONE seat to swing the Senate back to Mitch McConnell, and they are ready to spend gobs of money to make that happen. Can I count on you to pitch in now to help us close our budget gap before Tuesday's critical end-of-month deadline?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39092980/318377258/-1808413249?;amount=10&refcode=CVH_EM_FR_3MO_211128_1_1&refcode2=482ee231-9850-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&contactdata=%2B2wdL1gDi5vEfUzZufhB0G9kcVFoiIYaIY%2FTlc7YiREAc6N19qXPh1Bbp9uFCHrF&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODIzMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ODJlZTIzMS05ODUwLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FeruAr0dtEw22Nz4xO1irh_fzW6KtV6O8v2EPWXuaJE=) _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [CHIP IN $7 NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39092982/318377259/-1808413249?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=CVH_EM_FR_3MO_211128_1_1&refcode2=482ee231-9850-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&contactdata=%2B2wdL1gDi5vEfUzZufhB0G9kcVFoiIYaIY%2FTlc7YiREAc6N19qXPh1Bbp9uFCHrF&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODIzMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ODJlZTIzMS05ODUwLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FeruAr0dtEw22Nz4xO1irh_fzW6KtV6O8v2EPWXuaJE=)

It's a BIG deal. But not everyone agrees. Mitch McConnell and the big money special interests behind him are incensed that big multinational corporations who park their profits in overseas tax havens and the very wealthy who make over $10 million per year will pay higher taxes as part of this package. That's why Mitch and his Super PAC friends are actively recruiting Maryland's Republican Governor to run against me — someone who called the Build Back Better package "far-left" and a "reckless grab bag of giveaways." = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = = | = = | = = With your help, we're going to stay the course to accomplish the work the American people voted for and to defend our democracy from those trying to diminish it. Onwards, Chris * | Grassroots supporters like you help our campaign make the investments it will take to re-elect Chris in 2022 and protect our Democratic Senate majority: | = | = ---|--- PAID FOR BY Van Hollen for Senate Van Hollen for Senate | 10605 Concord Street, Suite 202 | Kensington, MD, 20895 If you need to, click to receive only our most important emails or you can unsubscribe here: You can also =.

---
You are such a valuable member of Maggie Hassan’s reelection team, and we’re so grateful to have you on board. Pundits say that Maggie’s seat in New Hampshire is one of the most likely to flip to Republican control -- that’s why it’s imperative that we keep our donation records up to date.
Maggie is counting on you, you know, but please _only_ contribute if you’re able to.
**[Just $5 will update your record and, more importantly, help ensure that the Hassan campaign has the funds needed to execute a strategy that will keep New Hampshire blue. Any amount works - the donation itself is far more important than the amount.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39093145/318377863/-1803038125?refcode=e20211128_nov-record&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxM2ZjOTM1YS05YTUwLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6ZQ0XZPzG6igGbkF3YUitrUKED5Wj91HL8DBYnRaJt0=)**
If this email seems urgent, that’s because it is. Maggie won her last race by just 1,017 votes, so it’s not hyperbole to say that every donation and every show of support could be the thing that wins (or loses) this race -- and the Senate.
Thank you for helping.
P.S. - If you’ve donated recently by mail or in person, thank you. We’ve received your donation, but it is still processing in our system.

| This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.

name: Great America Update
subject: The greatest armed conflict in human history
body:
Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us. [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c6511%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=buFsthPJs1dP9buMmSqu4g&sysid=1)
This sponsored message from Great America Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c67224%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=yRMm9FPaRyqr5P0Gw2ytdA&sysid=1) Dear Fellow American, Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us. This fact means that we’re losing more and more living memory of the greatest armed conflict in human history, which makes the study of World War II even more important. To this end, Hillsdale College has produced an online course entitled “The Second World Wars.” Taught by historian Victor Davis Hanson, this course explores how the conflict’s diverse theaters, belligerents, and ways of fighting came eventually to define a single war. And it examines the key investments, strategies, and leaders that led the Allied powers to victory over the Axis. [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c67235%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=ofWmQIfeb%2bVyNYxZcGzFcQ&sysid=1) If you’d like to secure a DVD set before they’re all gone, you can get one shipped directly to your home for any gift of $100 or more to Hillsdale College. Here’s a secure link to reserve your copy of “**The Second World Wars** ” on DVD: **[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-the-second-world-wars](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c67236%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=TflCf9y3WxD2p6UDL2CQNg&sysid=1)** Thank you for preserving liberty for future generations of Americans through education with Hillsdale College! Best regards, Kyle Murnen, ’09 Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College
---
_107 S West St. #826, Alexandria VA 22314_
_[Unsubscribe](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/OptOut.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c6511%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=buFsthPJs1dP9buMmSqu4g&sysid=1)_

[](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/CB.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c6511%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=buFsthPJs1dP9buMmSqu4g&sysid=1)

name: Cheri Beasley for Senate
subject: Good news and bad news
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Cheri Beasley for North Carolina
body:
#

We’ve got some good news and some bad news to share with you today.
**First, the good news:** We’re focused on building the sort of grassroots movement that it’s going to take to elect Cheri Beasley and flip this Senate seat. That includes donations from all 100 counties over 110 campaign stops all across the state, and the endorsement of thousands of people just like you.
**But, some bad news:** Mitch McConnell and his dark money allies have noticed our campaign’s strength, and they are not going to go down without a fight. Ted Budd’s billionaire backers at the Club for Growth super PAC are ALREADY on the air with $3 million in ads in North Carolina and have promised to spend millions more.
Plus, Mitch McConnell and Senate Republicans have over $29 MILLION on hand to spend in races like ours, so there’s no doubt they plan to spend millions attacking Cheri before next November.
**It’s a big challenge to overcome, but together we can prove that people-power is far stronger than any dark money.**
**[If you can afford it, please make a contribution — of $3 or any amount — to Cheri Beasley’s campaign today. We’re not taking a dime of corporate PAC money. So every donation from someone like you adds up, and it all makes a BIG difference to our success.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-em-nov21?refcode=em211128-1-7d&refcode2=71.357359.pQcpTd&t=1&akid=71%2E357359%2EpQcpTd)**

name: Self Reliance Central
subject: The key to Lincoln’s rhetorical success
body:
Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills, Abraham Lincoln credited his study of Eucli
| This sponsored message from Self Reliance Central is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | [](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2zo2nnrjonqi5qb2i0m6rb6474ie3brqb9vo6mtag_rp22sh2s8i66pj0shj61or6c1h2bs)
---|---
| | Dear Fellow American,
Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills, Abraham Lincoln credited his study of Euclid.
While studying law in Springfield, Lincoln explained, he became convinced that the ability to demonstrate the truth of things was essential to the good practice of law.
Consequently, Lincoln left his job, retired to his father’s cabin, and did not return until he could “give any proposition in the six books of Euclid at sight.”
By studying Euclid, we improve our ability to reason soundly—plus, in my experience, the study of Euclid can be great fun.
That’s why Hillsdale College has produced a free online course on the topic **“Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry.”**
Through**“Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry,”** you will learn the importance of deductive reasoning as a foundation for pursuing knowledge in all fields of learning, as well as in everyday life.
---
| | **Now, the course is available in a beautiful DVD box set for viewing in your home or for use in a small group.** **** **You can receive the DVD box set as a thank-you for your tax-deductible gift of $100 or more in support of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty.**
Your tax-deductible gift will help promote our free online courses and other educational outreach efforts in this critical time for our nation. And your gift matters even more because...
Hillsdale accomplishes all its work while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.
---
| [](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2zovq3hotb1vun96dlva7emgt621ueaipbpm2207o_rp22sh2s8i66pj0shj61or6c1h2bs)
---
| | That’s why we need the support of friends like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty.
Quantities of this special DVD box set are limited, so reserve your copy today. I’ve included a secure link for you to make your tax-deductible gift below:
[_**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/dvd-mathematics-and-logic-course**_](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2zg6464vsflpr33iu0e2kp0jqo95cni0ipr4hbfo0_rp22sh2s8i66pj0shj61or6c1h2bs)
Thank you for partnering with Hillsdale in its mission on behalf of liberty.
Warm regards,
Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---
| This email was sent by: Self-Reliance Central

name: Team Booker
subject: Our struggles
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Booker for Kentucky
body:
[1]Charles Booker

I know what it’s like to face hardship,
Peter.

I’ve lived in poverty. I’ve been unhoused. I’ve lost family members to gun
violence. I am still paying off my student loans.

My story is the story of millions of Kentuckians who are sick and tired of
politicians who continue to ignore us.

That’s why I’m running to defeat Rand Paul. Together, we’re spreading our
message for bold, transformative change so we can finally help regular
people — and I need your support.

[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/13396?refcode=em20211128-1264&t=1001&akid=1264%2E346206%2Em33TNp ]Peter, my team
just told me that we’re about 80% of the way to our $20,220 end-of-month
fundraising goal. Can I count on you to please chip in $5
or anything you can to help power our fight as we build the biggest
grassroots voter outreach program Kentucky has ever seen?

[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/13396?refcode=em20211128-1264&t=1002&akid=1264%2E346206%2Em33TNp ]Charles Booker supporters holding up Booker for Kentucky signs

Every day, I hear stories just like my own, of folks struggling to make
ends meet.

Here’s a story one of our supporters recently shared:

“I started supporting Charles Booker for a U.S. Senate seat last year when
I observed how much he loved and served his community in Louisville, where
he has been a lifelong resident. His candidacy became more personal to me,
though, when he started speaking out on social media about financial
struggle throughout his life. Having survived homelessness, rationing
insulin for Type 1 Diabetes, and having to live paycheck-to-paycheck, I
knew that he understood the struggles of many Americans. On August 25th
this summer, he posted the tweet shown in this post, and reading it made
me cry. I cried because I had felt shame for living paycheck-to-paycheck
most of my adult life, but here was a candidate who knew what it was like
and was committed to helping people like me.”

Your stories — our stories — are what drives this campaign to fight for
meaningful change. Together, we have the power to change the future of
Kentucky.

But this kind of deep organizing work requires significant resources and
funding, and the number-one way we can secure those resources is by
keeping our fundraising strong. So I have to ask again:

[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/13396?refcode=em20211128-1264&t=1022&akid=1264%2E346206%2Em33TNp ]Will you please chip in $5 or anything you can today so
that we can reach our $20,220 goal and sustain our important work to
replace Rand Paul?

[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/13396?refcode=em20211128-1264&t=1023&akid=1264%2E346206%2Em33TNp ]Contribute $5

Thank you,

Charles Booker

Contribute to Charles Booker: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-email-donate?refcode=em20211128-1264-footer&t=1024&refcode2=1264_346206_m33TNp&akid=1264%2E346206%2Em33TNp

clean_body: [1]Charles Booker I know what it’s like to face hardship, Peter. I’ve lived in poverty. I’ve been unhoused. I’ve lost family members to gun violence. I am still paying off my student loans. My story is the story of millions of Kentuckians who are sick and tired of politicians who continue to ignore us. That’s why I’m running to defeat Rand Paul. Together, we’re spreading our message for bold, transformative change so we can finally help regular people — and I need your support. [ ]Peter, my team just told me that we’re about 80% of the way to our $20,220 end-of-month fundraising goal. Can I count on you to please chip in $5 or anything you can to help power our fight as we build the biggest grassroots voter outreach program Kentucky has ever seen? [ ]Charles Booker supporters holding up Booker for Kentucky signs Every day, I hear stories just like my own, of folks struggling to make ends meet. Here’s a story one of our supporters recently shared: “I started supporting Charles Booker for a U.S. Senate seat last year when I observed how much he loved and served his community in Louisville, where he has been a lifelong resident. His candidacy became more personal to me, though, when he started speaking out on social media about financial struggle throughout his life. Having survived homelessness, rationing insulin for Type 1 Diabetes, and having to live paycheck-to-paycheck, I knew that he understood the struggles of many Americans. On August 25th this summer, he posted the tweet shown in this post, and reading it made me cry. I cried because I had felt shame for living paycheck-to-paycheck most of my adult life, but here was a candidate who knew what it was like and was committed to helping people like me.” Your stories — our stories — are what drives this campaign to fight for meaningful change. Together, we have the power to change the future of Kentucky. But this kind of deep organizing work requires significant resources and funding, and the number-one way we can secure those resources is by keeping our fundraising strong. So I have to ask again: [ ]Will you please chip in $5 or anything you can today so that we can reach our $20,220 goal and sustain our important work to replace Rand Paul? [ ]Contribute $5 Thank you, Charles Booker Contribute to Charles Booker:

Democrats' chances of winning future elections depends on what we do RIGHT NOW. >>](https://links.e.dccc.)**

We need to move NOW.

**FIRST:** Stacey Abrams helped Democrats FLIP Georgia and send shockwaves through the GOP.

**THEN:** Democrats in red states like Ohio, Wisconsin, and Pennsylvania saw their chance -- and started SURGING in the polls.

**BUT NOW:** Republicans are LIVID. And they've launched over 400 (!!!) voter suppression bills across the country that could prevent Democrats from ever winning again.

Democrats like Stacey Abrams are fighting back to stop this -- but she needs our help.

**[We're calling for 12,500 gifts before our End of Month Deadline in 48 hours to OVERCOME these historic Republican attacks on our elections and protect our House Majority. Will you stand with Stacey and rush $3 to elect House Democrats all across the country? >>](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/Ra_)**

body:
Hey Peter,
My name is Olivia. Sorry to drop into your inbox but I only have one quick question on behalf of Republican headquarters. I just combed through our database and -- as of 9:00 AM (EST) -- your name is missing from our official list of Conservatives who pledged to join President Trump's new app.
_Knowing how dedicated you are to our America first movement, we were a bit shocked and disappointed..._
**We know that Big Tech HATES the idea of Trump building his own site WITHOUT blacklists, shadow-banning, and Conservative censorship -- so maybe they're blocking our messages???**
[**If you _are_ receiving this important Republican communication, could you spare a moment to respond right away?**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58892340:6Szt7R2ON:m:1:3253819041:648683DE4471275B1A2ED05F346DCA9E:r)

---|---
I know you're busy so I'll wrap this up, but I really hope you'll respond.
I'll be going over our final results in about 10 minutes. [**Can I be on the lookout for your answer?**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58892340:6Szt7R2ON:m:1:3253819041:648683DE4471275B1A2ED05F346DCA9E:r)

\-- Olivia

Hi, Peter.

It's Kendall, Gov. Lujan Grisham's Communication Director. Did you see the latest message from our team? **I wish I had better news, but we're still short of our goal with just days before our fundraising blackout.**
As a part of this grassroots team, I need you to know that this is a dire moment for our campaign. In just a few days, a special legislative session will start, and Gov. Lujan Grisham won't be able to fundraise until _MARCH_.
**The GOP is pushing harder than ever to flip New Mexico red, and our finance team tells me that it's simply not an option to fall short of our end-of-month goal before this blackout. **
**[Please, Peter, Gov. Lujan Grisham can't keep New Mexico blue without your help: Will you donate $5 now?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39093789/318380787/-1540418300?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1115-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzc2OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2YTc3ODc5ZC05ZjUwLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=12O0x0IVgM8S4YqZq_n3urdnPPlL6GMZgArAtBtFgS8=)**

I had to reach out to you, Peter.
There will likely be a fundraising blackout in December, which means we have to raise as much as we can right now to keep New Mexico blue.
**I won't lie, this is alarming.** If we fail to reach our goals in the next few weeks, we'll start off 2022 behind my Republican challengers, and it will be an uphill battle to stop the GOP from pushing our state further right than ever before.
**[I need all hands on deck to help me raise $22,000 before the end of this month. I know it's an ambitious goal, but – trust me – this is what it takes to win. Will you donate $5 to stop the GOP, Peter?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39093791/318380789/-1540418300?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1115-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzc2OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2YTc3ODc5ZC05ZjUwLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=12O0x0IVgM8S4YqZq_n3urdnPPlL6GMZgArAtBtFgS8=)**
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39093792/318380790/-1540418300?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1115-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzc2OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2YTc3ODc5ZC05ZjUwLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=12O0x0IVgM8S4YqZq_n3urdnPPlL6GMZgArAtBtFgS8=)
As Governor of New Mexico, I've slashed taxes for working families, raised the minimum wage, legalized cannabis to end the war on drugs, and so much more. But if the GOP flips New Mexico red, they will erase all of our progress and pass dangerous, far-right policies.
Right next door in Texas, Gov. Greg Abbott just signed a near-total ban on abortion. **State governments are the first line of defense against extremist policies like these** , which is why it's so important to keep New Mexico blue to defend our personal freedoms.
**Please, if you have even a few dollars to spare, I need you to donate today to help me reach my $22,000 goal and keep New Mexico blue. I'm doing everything I can to pass my bold, progressive agenda – but I can't continue my work without your help:**
**[Will you donate $5 today to help me continue to push New Mexico toward a brighter future? In times like these, we can't afford to lose our momentum. I need every supporter reading this email to help me stand up against the GOP by donating today.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39093793/318380791/-1540418300?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1115-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzc2OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2YTc3ODc5ZC05ZjUwLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=12O0x0IVgM8S4YqZq_n3urdnPPlL6GMZgArAtBtFgS8=)**

body:

& nbsp; &nb; sp;

|

---
| | | [CONFIRM MY STATUS](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-2ye2y-1mrr8-4qqlpo0/ "CONFIRM MY STATUS")
---
You must respond before the app launches to be on the top supporter list. This is your final chance to confirm your status on Trump’s TRUTH Social app.
---
| | | [CONFIRM MY STATUS](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-2ye2y-1mrr9-4qqlpo1/ "CONFIRM MY STATUS")
---
This is a rare opportunity to join a community of GOP supporters on a platform that’s led by President Trump himself. If you pass it up, you’ll be throwing away a chance to help get Republicans back in control of our government!

Don’t let that happen. **[Act NOW to confirm your status and join the thousands of supporters who have already signed up to join>>>](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-2ye2y-1mrra-4qqlpo1/ "Act NOW to confirm your status and join the thousands of supporters who have already signed up to join >>>")**

Thank you,

House Republicans

---
| |
* * *

[](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-2ye2y-1mrrb-4qqlpo2/ "Trump Image Link")

**ATTN TRUMP PATRIOTS: TRUMP’S 2024 RUN HINGES ON FLIPPING 5 SEATS RED!**

Pelosi’s raising MILLIONS and spending MILLIONS MORE attacking freedom-loving patriots across the nation. She’s determined to ERASE Trump’s legacy and OBLITERATE his allies in Congress... _because she knows if we TAKE BACK THE HOUSE, Trump will run for PRESIDENT!_

We’re facing an uphill battle. We need each and every patriot who sees this to join the fight. If we fall even a dollar short, we will lose the House to Pelosi FOREVER. **[Fellow Conservative, can we count on you to step up?](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-2ye2y-1mrrc-4qqlpo3/ "Fellow Conservative, can we count on you to step up?")**

clean_body: Can you help us out? | | | Peter, With the holidays coming up soon, we’re putting together our plans for next year and realizing that there’s a big problem in one of our numbers. We only raised about 63% of the funds we planned on from emails like this in the month of November. That’s why we reached out, and Odessa reached out, and why we set a 500 donation goal before the end of the month. We know how hard it is to elect a progressive, working-class leader like Odessa, and that’s why we need as many donations as possible right now to run a competitive campaign in 2022. A donation a week before the election is tough to spend properly. But a donation now means we can fund deep organizing, targeted ads, or events in the community that get folks ready to trust Odessa with the job of Representative. That’s why you’re hearing so much from us about our fundraising, and we wouldn’t ask if it weren’t so important. Thanks for your help! Team Odessa | To give by check: Odessa for Congress 2817 West End Ave, Ste 126-401 Nashville, TN 37203

name: Derek Schmidt
subject: November is almost over!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY DEREK SCHMIDT FOR KANSAS, INC
body:
As we sat around the table this Thanksgiving, I realized that Kansas conservatives have a lot to be thankful for, especially in the past 30 days. In Friend, As we sat around the table this Thanksgiving, I realized that Kansas conservatives have a lot to be thankful for, especially in the past 30 days. In November, we stood up to the Biden administration and its unlawful vaccine mandates with three separate lawsuits to PROTECT Kansans from this gross federal overreach. Also in November, we beat the Biden administration in court and blocked their efforts to tell states how to set state tax policy. And this same month, we saw many more Kansas conservatives join our campaign as official endorsers. Momentum is on our side! **I was hoping that, given the huge successes of this month, you’d be willing to help end it with a bang. ** **We’re counting down the final days of November, and I was hoping body:

Friend,
Running for Congress is both invigorating and exhausting at times. Through the highs and the lows, the fact that Southern Arizona deserves to be heard in the halls of Congress is always at the forefront of my mind. We deserve someone who will go to work and fight every day for the Southern Arizona values we all hold dear.
So when Scott and Helen surprised me a few minutes ago with the list of all of you who made a birthday contribution to this campaign, _I was overwhelmed._ I was also reminded of just how important this seat, and this race, is to you.
Let me say thank you. I know you’re asked to support dozens of great candidates every day, and the fact you chose to contribute to our race means the world to me.
Again, thank you so much. Now let’s go win this thing together.
Sincerely,
Kirsten
---

clean_body: While our movement is built on an average donation of $14.89, Kyrsten Sinema managed to rake in $1.1 million from Big Pharma PACs, multi-level marketing corporations, and GOP donors. | | | Peter, Can we share this screenshot of our average contribution this month from our ActBlue — our fundraising platform — with you? (It's one of the first things we see when we sign into our ActBlue dashboard.) We're proud of what this $14.89 figure represents: thousands of people, from Arizona and all across our country, building power and chipping in what they can to build a grassroots base to oust Kyrsten Sinema for someone who will answer to and work for the people. While our movement is built on an average donation of $14.89, Sinema managed to rake in $1.1 million from Big Pharma PACs, multi-level marketing corporations, and GOP donors. Even her donor base is majority out-of-state; nearly 90% of her contributions came from outside of Arizona. Meanwhile, we're strategically investing in grassroots organizations on the ground, right here in Arizona, that have smart ideas for anti-Sinema organizing and communications efforts. Peter, your $14.89 donations are the reason why our movement to bring better leadership to Arizona has grown. Your donations are the reason why we're able to bolster the efforts of grassroots organizations doing the work to oust Sinema — and they're the reason why we'll be able to continue doing this urgent work. We can't do this work without you — and we rely on your donations to build strong movements in Arizona that can go up against Kyrsten Sinema and her millions. Thank you, Primary Sinema | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. Friend, it turns out coming to Arizona and riling his base wasn't enough for Donald Trump: **Trump has officially endorsed my far-right extremist opponent in a desperate bid to keep Arizona red.**
THIS is exactly why we set an ambitious end-of-month fundraising goal – because the stakes are rising every minute, and every dollar we bring in will go directly toward defeating Trump's handpicked candidate. **But we're still short of our goal, and this would be the WORST possible time to let the failed Republicans who are cheering this endorsement see us fall behind. **

Friend, this isn't even just about Trump. The opponent he endorsed, Kari Lake (R), is extreme enough on her own. She's the one who saw Texas leaders attacking reproductive rights and denying abortion access and said, _"Well done, Texas. Arizona is next." _She's anti-abortion, anti-vaccine, supports building Trump's asinine border wall and refuses to accept that the 2020 election was legitimate.
**In short, she's everything Arizona needs LESS of, NOT more. But this Trump endorsement will open the floodgates to GOP dark money and attack ads – so if we don't hit our midnight goal and build the resources we need to fight back, she could actually win this TOSS-UP race and drive Arizona into the dark ages.**
Look: Arizona is already 2022's top battleground, and this only makes things more critical. But election experts say we have a real shot at winning if we can stay competitive, and hitting this goal is how we do that. Time is running out, and I've never counted on you more:

**Please read on for a personal message from Democrat Marco Lopez:**
Friend, I’m so grateful you’re part of our people-powered movement to flip Arizona blue. But I have to be honest: I’m counting on your help now more than ever. I’m a proud Democrat, former border city mayor and Obama administration alum – and I’m running for governor to build a state that works for all our people. name: Jayapal HQ
subject: Notoriously tough
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
#
Peter, we know you're wrapping up a busy and hopefully fun-filled long Thanksgiving weekend, so we'll keep it brief.
**Here's the deal:** The holidays are a notoriously tough time for grassroots, small-dollar fundraising because people check their email less frequently! That's a problem when those grassroots contributions make up a significant chunk of our overall fundraising.
**So when we hit a holiday slowdown like the one we're in right now,****_every single contribution_****has a bigger impact than before.**
Thankfully, the month isn't over yet — and we still have time to close our fundraising gap before we have to worry about missing our $35,000 November goal. [**So****, Peter can you chip in $3 or any amount so we can catch up on our fundraising and continue pushing for the passage of the Build Back Better Act in the Senate — among other progressive priorities?**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/8961?refcode=em20211128-828&%3Bamounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=828%2E420207%2Eaj-OVT)
**[Chip in $3 »](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/8961?refcode=em20211128-828&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=20&akid=828%2E420207%2Eaj-OVT)**
Thanks for helping us catch up at a critical time for our movement,
Team Jayapal

**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20211128-828-footer&t=21&refcode2=828_420207_aj-OVT&akid=828%2E420207%2Eaj-OVT)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/pramila.jayapal) | [](https://twitter.com/pramilajayapal) | [](https://www.instagram.com/pramilajayapal/)
Email us: info@pramilaforcongress.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, and small-dollar contributions sustain our movement for transformative change. To contribute by check, please address to Pramila for Congress, PO Box 21912, Seattle, WA 98111.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/did-your-info-change/?t=22&akid=828%2E420207%2Eaj-OVT)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=23&akid=828%2E420207%2Eaj-OVT)

Paid for by Pramila for Congress

name: Nancy Pelosi
subject: Reflecting on Lincoln’s Thanksgiving Message as We Build Back Better
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Nancy Pelosi for Congress
body:
---
| | Dear friends, Again and again, I write to express my gratitude for your support to make the future better. In that spirit, I am writing to tell you that during Thanksgiving week, the San Francisco Interfaith Council gathered to honor the 100th birthday of its founder Rita Semel, who enjoyed every moment of it. The ceremony was a glorious one of faith and love and unity. A highlight of the occasion was the invoking of Lincoln’s Thanksgiving Day proclamation, which he issued On October 3rd, 1863 and states: “I do therefore invite my fellow-citizens in every part of the United States, and also those who are at sea and those who are sojourning in foreign lands, to set apart and observe the last Thursday of November [next] as a day of thanksgiving and praise to our beneficent Father who dwelleth in the heavens... and implore the interposition of the Almighty Hand to heal the wounds of the nation and to restore it... to the full enjoyment of peace, harmony, tranquility, and union.” As always, President Lincoln’s patriotic words then are an inspiration to us now. I hope that your Thanksgiving was a blessed one. Gratefully, NANCY

---

Nancy Pelosi is the Speaker of the U.S. House of Representatives. As the top Democrat in the House, she's fighting to help working families and protect America from the dangerous agenda of Mitch McConnell and Kevin McCarthy. We know you're getting a lot of emails -- but it's only because what we're facing right now as a country is so important. Nancy is committed to doing whatever it takes to elect a record-breaking number of Democrats in the next election and beyond. Can we count on your support? **[DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39095637/318406910/1694321165?refcode=footer&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDIvMS84ODQ2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjYTk3N2QzMy1iMDUwLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=HnntUoAhQconfwE96diJF8OZzHHNkE_mYfc-fBOaIO0=)** **[SHOP](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39095638/318406911/-1622768287?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDIvMS84ODQ2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjYTk3N2QzMy1iMDUwLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=HnntUoAhQconfwE96diJF8OZzHHNkE_mYfc-fBOaIO0=&emci=55fbc4a2-af50-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=ca977d33-b050-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=16320219)** Nancy isn't one to back down from a fight, and we're in this for the long haul. name: Rep. Demings (personal)
subject: End of Month Update
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Val Demings for U
body:
Florida Senate races often come down to the slimmest margins – just 0.12 percentage points in 2018.
| | | I hate coming to you like this, but I have nowhere else to turn, friend.
---
Since I announced my Senate campaign, I've been overwhelmed with support from members of this grassroots team. That's why we set an ambitious goal to fundraise $200,000 by my End of Month Deadline.
But with hours left to go, my finance team says we're missing that target, and I'm not sure we can close the gap.
Florida Senate races often come down to the margin of error – just 0.12 percentage points in 2018 – and every dollar we raise could be the difference between winning and losing a better voice in the U.S. Senate.
I know this race won't be easy – but I'm not afraid of the challenge. I'm disappointed in Marco Rubio's lack of leadership for this state and country – for his inability to stand up for what's right.

_It's time for a change._ He refused to vote for critical COVID relief. He refused to vote for protecting voting rights and election security. It doesn't make sense for Florida, so I've come to this conclusion: Marco Rubio will choose party over state – over country – every time.
I can't win without hitting fundraising goals like this. And I can't hit fundraising goals like this without you, friend.

So please, if you have anything to spare ahead of my End of Month Deadline, here's the best link to give:
**[_https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/vd_senate-fr-email_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39095645/318407001/-892300846?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1790-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZDZmOTI1Yy1iMDUwLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-fvhq5vL4EPlKBv0P0MWGOjBYfJdSkZx9qioFeZrpOQ=)**
I'm so grateful for your support,

Val Demings
| This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
[To unsubscribe from this email list, please click here.](https://email.ngpvan.com/unsubscribeUnique/e48c885e-114c-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8/4d6f925c-b050-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZDZmOTI1Yy1iMDUwLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-fvhq5vL4EPlKBv0P0MWGOjBYfJdSkZx9qioFeZrpOQ=&id=123159867) | | Paid for by Val Demings for U.S. Senate

subject: The timing is not great

body:
#

Friends — This is NOT the news we were hoping to share today.
We have just a few days until our important November fundraising drive ends, and we still have some work to do to reach our 50,000 contribution goal. The timing is not great.
Now usually, we wouldn’t be so worried about this. But we’re facing two big problems right now: First, we’re already facing millions of dollars in attack ads against Mark. And second, this month CNN named us one of the Senate seats most likely to flip in 2022.
So we really can’t afford to fall short. It is critical that our fundraising stays on track because if it doesn’t, Mitch McConnell and his allies will spot an opening and continue to attack our campaign.
[**So here’s the plan: Can you send a $3 donation to our people-powered campaign today? name: Beto for Texas
subject: We’re proud of this fact
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Beto for Texas
body:
This is how you know our campaign is powered by people.
#
We want to share a fact we’re proud of:
**So far, more than 95% of donations to our campaign are $100 or less.**
That’s how you know this campaign is powered by people, not special interests. We wouldn’t have it any other way.
In case you missed Jason’s announcement this morning, our goal is to raise $200,000 by midnight on November 30, our first end-of-month deadline as a campaign. It’s a bold goal, but we believe our grassroots team will get us there thanks to folks like you chipping in $5 or $20 at a time.
[Please step up as one of the grassroots donors to help Beto for Texas reach our first end-of-month fundraising goal. You can help put us over the top! ](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/50223?refcode=ema20211128-164580&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=164580%2E444211%2EsB6Udy)
**[Contribute $3](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/50223?refcode=ema20211128-164580&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=20&akid=164580%2E444211%2EsB6Udy)**
Goals like this one aren’t just arbitrary numbers. We set our end-of-month grassroots goals by taking a hard look at the needs of our campaign and the challenges that lie ahead.
Our November goal takes into account our bold plans to visit and organize in every single county in Texas, as we build the most powerful grassroots organizing program this state has ever seen. There’s a LOT of work ahead, and it requires serious resources.
We’re so excited to keep building this campaign and elect the kind of Governor that Texans deserve, but we’re going to need to keep asking for your support.
[Will you join thousands of folks chipping in and help hit our end-of-month goal?](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/50223?refcode=ema20211128-164580&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&akid=164580%2E444211%2EsB6Udy)
Thank you for doing your part,
Beto for Texas

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bft-em-footer?refcode=em20211128-164580-footer&t=22&refcode2=164580_444211_sB6Udy&akid=164580%2E444211%2EsB6Udy)**
---
Email us: info@betofortexas.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Grassroots supporters like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Beto for Texas, PO Box 302647, Austin, TX 78703.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.betoorourke.com/signup/bft-receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.betoorourke.com/sign/bft-personal-info/?t=23&akid=164580%2E444211%2EsB6Udy)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.betoorourke.com/unsubscribe/bft-unsubscribe/?t=24&akid=164580%2E444211%2EsB6Udy)

Pol. Adv. Paid for by Beto for Texas.

name: JusticeDemocrats.com
subject: When it comes down to it, the establishment won’t fight for working people
body:
#
Peter,
Our end-of-month fundraising deadline is on Tuesday, and we’re doing everything we can to make sure we meet our $30,000 end-of-month goal by then.
A lot has happened in this last month. Progressives fought the establishment to hold the line and win investments for working people. The country saw firsthand the power of Justice Democrats coming together to challenge corporate and political interests.**But we were also reminded that we won’t be able to pass Medicare for All, win a Green New Deal, or cancel student loan debt without more progressives in Congress.**
We need more candidates to join AOC, Ilhan, Ayanna, Rashida, Jamaal, Cori, and the rest of the Justice Democrats in Congress. **[Can you chip in $3 so we have the resources to go all-in during the 2022 midterms? We need to ensure we have the resources to beat out-of-touch incumbents AND expand our JD coalition.**](https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/84562?refcode=em20211128-20719&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=20&akid=20719%2E1203867%2E1jEfQo)
**[Contribute $3](https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/84562?refcode=em20211128-20719&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&akid=20719%2E1203867%2E1jEfQo)**
The DCCC might have raised $11.6 million last month, but what we lack in mega-donors and corporate PAC contributions, we make up for in people power.
We’re undeterred in our goal to elect progressives to Congress and fundamentally transform the Democratic party. The last month has shown us that when it comes down to the wire, the establishment won’t fight for working people and pass popular and necessary progressive policies.
That’s why if we really want to make a change, we’ll need to build our political power and elect more progressives to Congress. **[Chip in $3 to join us in our work to transform the Democratic party into a party that will fight for everyone, not just the wealthy or corporations.**](https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/84562?refcode=em20211128-20719&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=22&akid=20719%2E1203867%2E1jEfQo)
**[Contribute $3](https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/84562?refcode=em20211128-20719&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=23&akid=20719%2E1203867%2E1jEfQo)**
In solidarity,
Justice Democrats

Do not worry if you cannot afford to make a contribution — we understand that this is a difficult time. If you’re struggling, you can find a food bank [here.](https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/28883?t=24&akid=20719%2E1203867%2E1jEfQo) We appreciate everything you do to keep our movement strong. Please stay informed and follow the most up-to-date recommendations from the [Centers for Disease Control](https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/24438?t=25&akid=20719%2E1203867%2E1jEfQo) and your state public health department.
---

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20211128-20719-footer&t=26&refcode2=20719_1203867_1jEfQo&akid=20719%2E1203867%2E1jEfQo)**
---
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.
Federal candidates or officeholders mentioned above are not asking for more than $5,000 per calendar year from individuals or other federally permissible sources, nor are they asking for any funds from corporations, labor unions, or any other federally prohibited sources.
JusticeDemocrats.com
10629 Hardin Valley Rd, #226, Knoxville, TN 37932
Email us: [us@justicedemocrats.com](mailto:us@justicedemocrats.com)

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://go.justicedemocrats.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://go.justicedemocrats.com/signup/did-your-information-change/?t=27&akid=20719%2E1203867%2E1jEfQo)
* [Unsubscribe](https://go.justicedemocrats.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=28&akid=20719%2E1203867%2E1jEfQo)

name: Nancy Pelosi
subject: massive loss
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DCCC | 430 South Capitol Street SE, Washington, DC 20003 | [(202) 863-1500](http://dccc
body:
| | | [](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/Z6_Zc-) I cannot believe what I'm seeing.

First, Trump threatened to run for President if Republicans retake the House.

Now, he and his Republicans have $102 MILLION in their war chest to unload during the midterms.

**[I will stop this one-term President and his Republicans from taking back the House -- no matter what it takes. Here's my plan: I'm calling for 12,000 Democratic Member gifts before my End of Month Deadline in 48 hours to make Trump's plot completely BACKFIRE. If you could rush a gift before midnight Tuesday, it'd help my Democrats HOLD our House Majority and hand Trump and his Republicans the most EMBARRASSING rebuke yet. Can I count on your $3 to defeat House Republicans? >>](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/j~)** | [](https://links.e.dccc.)
2021 DEMOCRATIC MEMBERSHIP STATUS: **PENDING**
[Suggested Support: $3](https://links.e.dccc.)
---

Hear me:

Trump has hinged his entire run for President on my Democrats losing the House.

And now he and his Republicans have $102 MILLION to help pull it off.

I will NOT allow that to happen \-- but I can't fight his cash haul alone.

****[I can't overstate the urgency: I'm calling for 12,000 gifts in the next 48 hours to PROTECT my House Majority and make Trump's nasty plot BACKFIRE. Can you help defend our House Democrats today? >>](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/_)****

We're working hard to make sure we protect our Democratic Majority -- and to put an end to Republicans' obstruction for good. President Biden can't do it all. |

Team, We’ll make this quick so you can get back to enjoying your Thanksgiving weekend — Our dad’s been incredibly busy — visiting every county in Colorado, working to extend the Child Tax Credit expansion, and getting the historic bipartisan infrastructure bill passed (just to mention a few things). Today is his birthday, and he’s a tough guy to impress — so finding the right birthday gift is always a challenge for us. That’s why we’re coming to his dedicated supporters for help. We want to surprise him with a birthday card signed by folks like you and the people he serves in the Senate. Dad is always there for us: cooking dinner, answering our calls (no matter how inconvenient), coming to our performances (repeatedly), and when needed, helping with our homework. **Please help us be there for him: Take a moment to sign the card and help us wish our dad a happy birthday.** | | **[SIGN THE CARD](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39096128/318412142/643478649?refcode=AU_MFB_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20211128_PM2_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiZTBlZDg3OC1jNDUwLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Cl7bbHjPuOB5BGMyG3isAadk3YTa0mfNwVCrv_0L3h8=&emci=fbd9585e-9f50-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=be0ed878-c450-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=1295540)**

Caroline, Halina, and Anne

name: Tim Ryan
subject: I’m asking you for $5, and I’ll explain why
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tim Ryan for Ohio
body:
[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/46?t=1001&akid=1562%2E3611125%2E8xwgMg ][IMG]

Folks --[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/6194?t=1007&akid=1562%2E3611125%2E8xwgMg ] I’m about to ask you to chip in $5 toward my
end-of-month fundraising goal. But first, I want to tell you why I’m
confident we can prove the skeptics wrong and win this battleground race.

1. Republican Senator Rob Portman is retiring, leaving Ohio’s Senate seat
wide open. Republicans are fighting it out in a messy and expensive
primary -- giving us a stronger chance of flipping this seat blue.
2. Ohio already has a Democratic Senator. Sherrod Brown has proven that
Ohioans want to elect a Senator who puts workers first.
3. A recent poll has me within single digits of my Republican opponents.
It’s still early in the race, and the more we get our message out, the
more voters we’ll win over.
4. Working people are fed up and ready for change. I’ve been travelling
all over the state, and Ohioans are sick of handouts for big
corporations and billionaires -- they want good-paying jobs, health
care they can afford, and a fair shot for their kids to succeed.
5. We have grassroots momentum. While my rich Republican opponents are
propping up their campaigns with millions of their own dollars, we’re
powered by folks who chip in $5, $25, or $100 at a time.

So, yes, we have a real path to winning this race -- but it
will take everything we have to pull it off.

November and December are tough months for campaign fundraising. People
are starting to tune out for the holidays, and we’re already seeing a huge
dropoff in donations.

Here’s my ask: [ https://act.timforoh.com/go/6194?t=1008&akid=1562%2E3611125%2E8xwgMg ]Will you chip in just $5 or more to help us combat the
holiday slump and get back on track before our end-of-month deadline hits?

clean_body: [ ][IMG] Folks --[ ] I’m about to ask you to chip in $5 toward my end-of-month fundraising goal. But first, I want to tell you why I’m confident we can prove the skeptics wrong and win this battleground race. 1. Republican Senator Rob Portman is retiring, leaving Ohio’s Senate seat wide open. Republicans are fighting it out in a messy and expensive primary -- giving us a stronger chance of flipping this seat blue. 2. Ohio already has a Democratic Senator. Sherrod Brown has proven that Ohioans want to elect a Senator who puts workers first. 3. A recent poll has me within single digits of my Republican opponents. It’s still early in the race, and the more we get our message out, the more voters we’ll win over. 4. Working people are fed up and ready for change. I’ve been travelling all over the state, and Ohioans are sick of handouts for big corporations and billionaires -- they want good-paying jobs, health care they can afford, and a fair shot for their kids to succeed. 5. We have grassroots momentum. While my rich Republican opponents are propping up their campaigns with millions of their own dollars, we’re powered by folks who chip in $5, $25, or $100 at a time. So, yes, we have a real path to winning this race -- but it will take everything we have to pull it off. November and December are tough months for campaign fundraising. People are starting to tune out for the holidays, and we’re already seeing a huge dropoff in donations. Here’s my ask: [ ]Will you chip in just $5 or more to help us combat the holiday slump and get back on track before our end-of-month deadline hits? body:
| | [ ](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/atcYNHk4Eh2YdGnwBh-YDIxeDWqAtfj4Fn87VuYfG4Xt4DQgNWFgDCOefFWaI9Dp_O6IxexNATE7cITP5W1rXb8BlbLHOFxWdi6Nh2hNxFp1kZwC200z8OdsT3_3o5NCsR2aN7GfyugiGZ0OfD_FV6kdUC0vi-30VyMVCxbLC1ZMVTypRJBVU6SRx8ekdTOp3yueF9aCiZSws2j2DUcEzlrzkYXc7u9d02lyaZN7fPvPAtlNBVrS1lweNgU-Arm9k0RMZKB7Tlm33EOatTAbyWz-faOb5fMxEZpp7EPDNQA/3he/M90OLXdYQgiDYGnyDOtS0Q/h0/4ge79eugpaZ1s4CUqlLKWAW-HFYETNre1hxApXGyUcY)

Peter -- I'm sure your inbox is already flooded announcing all the deals coming up for 'Cyber Monday.' **Well this is not one of those emails, because the only deal we want is a Green New Deal**. We started Future Generations to support grassroots candidates up and down the ballot who fight for climate justice, economic justice, and racial justice. And we are proud of the outstanding community leaders on our slate. Our candidates are counting on us to help them beat corporate cash and win their races -- **and that 's where you come in.** **We need to raise another $3,745 before midnight on Tuesday to meet our budget for the coming month. Can you pitch in $10, $25, or even $100 to help us close the gap?**
---

clean_body: | | Peter -- I'm sure your inbox is already flooded announcing all the deals coming up for 'Cyber Monday.' Well this is not one of those emails, because the only deal we want is a Green New Deal. We started Future Generations to support grassroots candidates up and down the ballot who fight for climate justice, economic justice, and racial justice. And we are proud of the outstanding community leaders on our slate. Our candidates are counting on us to help them beat corporate cash and win their races -- and that 's where you come in. We need to raise another $3,745 before midnight on Tuesday to meet our budget for the coming month. Can you pitch in $10, $25, or even $100 to help us close the gap? If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: In 2020 we helped deliver some shocking wins up and down the ballot. Now we need to build on that in 2022, and we need you on the team. Your contributions go toward digital tools and training for the hundreds of volunteers who offer their time to our endorsed candidates and to Future Generations. Thank you for joining our fight for the future. In solidarity, Roza | | Future Generations is a youth-founded, youth-led movement guided by the Seventh Generations philosophy, building a sustainable world for the next seven generations. We partner with progressives up and down the ballot to stop the climate crisis, fighting for universal healthcare, racial and economic justice. We don't take money from corporate PACs or lobbyists. In 2020 we helped re-elect GND champion Sen. Ed Markey and flipped crucial down-ballot seats. We're building a powerful slate for 2022, and we need your help. Friend,

We are going through our End-of-Month numbers for November, and I would be lying if I said I wasn’t concerned. Not only have we not reached our goal for this month yet, but I have multiple Democrat opponents who will stop at nothing to out-fundraise me.
**WE CAN’T LET THEM TAKE ME DOWN.**
